MedidaADEREN_ATIVIDADES.Z_ADEREN_ATIV_DIAS_REALIZADOS

    DIVIDE(SUM(ADEREN_ATIVIDADES[POND_AREA_REALIZADA]),SUM(ADEREN_ATIVIDADES[AREA_REALIZADA]))
MedidaADEREN_ATIVIDADES.Z_ADEREN_ATIV_DIAS_SALDO

    DIVIDE(SUM(ADEREN_ATIVIDADES[POND_AREA_SALDO]),SUM(ADEREN_ATIVIDADES[AREA_SALDO]))
MedidaADEREN_ATIVIDADES.Z_ADEREN_ATIV_TALHOES

VAR TLH = CONCATENATEX(ADEREN_ATIVIDADES,VALUE(ADEREN_ATIVIDADES[TALHAO]),", ",ADEREN_ATIVIDADES[TALHAO],ASC)
RETURN
SWITCH(
    TRUE(),
    ISINSCOPE(ADEREN_ATIVIDADES[DESC_FAZENDA]),TLH
)
MedidaADEREN_ATIVIDADES_AGRONO.Z_ADEREN_ATIV_AGRO_DIAS_REALIZADOS

    DIVIDE(SUM(ADEREN_ATIVIDADES_AGRONO[POND_AREA_REALIZADA]),SUM(ADEREN_ATIVIDADES_AGRONO[AREA_REALIZADA]))
MedidaADEREN_ATIVIDADES_AGRONO.Z_ADEREN_ATIV_AGRO_DIAS_SALDO

    DIVIDE(SUM(ADEREN_ATIVIDADES_AGRONO[POND_AREA_SALDO]),SUM(ADEREN_ATIVIDADES_AGRONO[AREA_SALDO]))
MedidaADEREN_ATIVIDADES_AGRONO.Z_ADEREN_ATIV_AGRO_TALHOES

VAR TLH = CONCATENATEX(ADEREN_ATIVIDADES_AGRONO,VALUE(ADEREN_ATIVIDADES_AGRONO[TALHAO]),", ",ADEREN_ATIVIDADES_AGRONO[TALHAO],ASC)
RETURN
SWITCH(
    TRUE(),
    ISINSCOPE(ADEREN_ATIVIDADES_AGRONO[DESC_FAZENDA]),TLH
)
MedidaADEREN_ATIVIDADES_MATURAC.Z_ADEREN_ATIV_MATUR_DIAS_REALIZADOS

    DIVIDE(SUM(ADEREN_ATIVIDADES_MATURAC[POND_AREA_REALIZADA]),
           SUM(ADEREN_ATIVIDADES_MATURAC[AREA_REALIZADA])
           )
MedidaADEREN_ATIVIDADES_MATURAC.Z_ADEREN_ATIV_MATUR_DIAS_SALDO

    DIVIDE(SUM(ADEREN_ATIVIDADES_MATURAC[POND_AREA_SALDO]),
           SUM(ADEREN_ATIVIDADES_MATURAC[AREA_SALDO]))
MedidaADEREN_ATIVIDADES_MATURAC.Z_ADEREN_ATIV_MATUR_TALHOES

VAR TLH = CONCATENATEX(ADEREN_ATIVIDADES_MATURAC,
                        VALUE(ADEREN_ATIVIDADES_MATURAC[TALHAO]),", ",ADEREN_ATIVIDADES_MATURAC[TALHAO],ASC)
RETURN
SWITCH(
    TRUE(),
    ISINSCOPE(ADEREN_ATIVIDADES_MATURAC[DESC_FAZENDA]),TLH
)
MedidaADEREN_ESTRVERM.Z_ADEREN_ESTRVERM_IDADE_STATUS

DIVIDE(
    SUM([POND_IDADE_STATUS]),
    SUM([QT_AREA_PROD])
)
MedidaAGRO_CIGARRINHA.Z_AGRO_CIGARR_LEGENDA

IF(DIVIDE(SUM([QT_NINFAS]),SUM([QT_AMOSTRA])) <= 0.5,
    "<= "&[Z_AGRO_CIGARR_META]&" Ninfas/metro",
    "> "&[Z_AGRO_CIGARR_META]&" Ninfas/metro")
MedidaAGRO_CIGARRINHA.Z_AGRO_CIGARR_META
0.5
MedidaAGRO_CIGARRINHA.Z_AGRO_CIGARR_REAL

DIVIDE(SUM([QT_NINFAS]),SUM([QT_AMOSTRA]))
MedidaAGRO_CIGARRINHA.Z_AGRO_CIGARR_REAL_TAMANHO

IF(ROUND(DIVIDE(SUM([QT_NINFAS]),SUM([QT_AMOSTRA])),2)=0,0.001,DIVIDE(SUM([QT_NINFAS]),SUM([QT_AMOSTRA])))
MedidaAGRO_DATA.DT_HOJE
FORMAT(NOW(),"DD/MM/YYYY")
MedidaAGRO_DATA.DT_ONTEM
FORMAT(NOW()-1,"DD/MM/YYYY")
MedidaAGRO_DATA.SEMANA_ATUAL
FORMAT(NOW()+7-WEEKDAY(NOW(),2),"DD/MM/YYYY")
MedidaAGRO_DATA.SEMANA_ÚLTIMA
FORMAT(NOW()-WEEKDAY(NOW(),2),"DD/MM/YYYY")
MedidaAGRO_MIGDOLUS.Z_AGRO_MIDGOLUS_META
0.07
MedidaAGRO_MIGDOLUS.Z_AGRO_MIGDOLUS_LEGENDA

IF(DIVIDE(SUM([LARVAS]),SUM([AREA])) <= [Z_AGRO_MIDGOLUS_META],
    "<= " & [Z_AGRO_MIDGOLUS_META] & " Larvas/metro",
    "> " & [Z_AGRO_MIDGOLUS_META] & " Larvas/metro")
MedidaAGRO_MIGDOLUS.Z_AGRO_MIGDOLUS_REAL

IF(SUM([AREA])=0,0,DIVIDE(SUM([LARVAS]),SUM([AREA])))
MedidaAGRO_MIGDOLUS.Z_AGRO_MIGDOLUS_REAL_TAMANHO

IF(ROUND(DIVIDE(SUM([LARVAS]),SUM([AREA])),2)=0,0.001,DIVIDE(SUM([LARVAS]),SUM([AREA])))
MedidaAGRO_MIGDOLUS.zdts
MAX(AGRO_MIGDOLUS[DT_COLETA])
MedidaAGRO_OUTR_PRAGAS.Z_AGRO_OUTPRAG_REAL_TAMANHO

IF((
        +SUM([BROCA_PELUDA])
        +SUM([CRISOMELIDEO])
        +SUM([LARVA_ARAME])
        +SUM([METAMASIUS])
        +SUM([NAUPACTUS])
        +SUM([PAO_GALINHA])
        +SUM([PERCEVEJO_CASTANHO])
    )=0,0.001,
        +SUM([BROCA_PELUDA])
        +SUM([CRISOMELIDEO])
        +SUM([LARVA_ARAME])
        +SUM([METAMASIUS])
        +SUM([NAUPACTUS])
        +SUM([PAO_GALINHA])
        +SUM([PERCEVEJO_CASTANHO])
)
MedidaAGRO_OUTR_PRAGAS.Z_AGRO_OUTPRAG_REAL_TOTAL

+SUM([BROCA_PELUDA])
+SUM([CRISOMELIDEO])
+SUM([LARVA_ARAME])
+SUM([METAMASIUS])
+SUM([NAUPACTUS])
+SUM([PAO_GALINHA])
+SUM([PERCEVEJO_CASTANHO])
MedidaAGRO_QLD_MUDA.Z_QLDMUDA_GEMASQTDE

(
    CALCULATE(SUM(AGRO_QLD_MUDA[VL_REAL]),
        FILTER(AGRO_QLD_MUDA,AGRO_QLD_MUDA[CD_INDICADOR] IN {3})
    )
    / CALCULATE(COUNT(AGRO_QLD_MUDA[NO_AMOSTRA]),
        FILTER(AGRO_QLD_MUDA,AGRO_QLD_MUDA[CD_INDICADOR] IN {3})
    )
    / 10
) * 1.5
MedidaAGRO_QLD_MUDA.Z_QLDMUDA_GEMASVIAVEIS

DIVIDE(
    CALCULATE(SUM(AGRO_QLD_MUDA[VL_REAL]),
        FILTER(AGRO_QLD_MUDA,AGRO_QLD_MUDA[CD_INDICADOR] IN {3})
    ),
    CALCULATE(SUM(AGRO_QLD_MUDA[VL_REAL]),
        FILTER(AGRO_QLD_MUDA,AGRO_QLD_MUDA[CD_INDICADOR] IN {3,4,5,6})
    )
)
MedidaAGRO_QLD_MUDA.Z_QLDMUDA_IIF

DIVIDE(
    DIVIDE(
        CALCULATE(SUM(AGRO_QLD_MUDA[VL_REAL]),
            FILTER(AGRO_QLD_MUDA,AGRO_QLD_MUDA[CD_INDICADOR] IN {8})
        ),
        CALCULATE(SUM(AGRO_QLD_MUDA[NO_AMOSTRA]),
            FILTER(AGRO_QLD_MUDA,AGRO_QLD_MUDA[CD_INDICADOR] IN {7})
        )
    ),
    100
)
MedidaAGRO_QLD_MUDA.Z_QLDMUDA_PERFILHOSxALTURA

DIVIDE(
    CALCULATE(SUM(AGRO_QLD_MUDA[VL_REAL]),
        FILTER(AGRO_QLD_MUDA,AGRO_QLD_MUDA[CD_INDICADOR] IN {2})
    ),
    CALCULATE(COUNT(AGRO_QLD_MUDA[NO_AMOSTRA]),
        FILTER(AGRO_QLD_MUDA,AGRO_QLD_MUDA[CD_INDICADOR] IN {2})
    )*10
)
MedidaAGRO_QLD_MUDA.Z_QLDMUDA_PERFILHOSxMETRO

DIVIDE(
    CALCULATE(SUM(AGRO_QLD_MUDA[VL_REAL]),
        FILTER(AGRO_QLD_MUDA,AGRO_QLD_MUDA[CD_INDICADOR] IN {1})
    ),
    CALCULATE(COUNT(AGRO_QLD_MUDA[NO_AMOSTRA]),
        FILTER(AGRO_QLD_MUDA,AGRO_QLD_MUDA[CD_INDICADOR] IN {1})
    )*20
)
MedidaAGRO_QLD_MUDA.Z_QLDMUDA_TXMULTIPLIC

DIVIDE(
    [Z_QLDMUDA_PERFILHOSxMETRO] * [Z_QLDMUDA_PERFILHOSxALTURA]
    ,
    1.5
)
MedidaAGRO_QLD_MUDA.Z_QLDMUDA_TXMULTIPLIC_80%

[Z_QLDMUDA_TXMULTIPLIC] * 0.8
MedidaAGRO_QLD_MUDA.Z_QLDMUDA_TXMULTIPLIC_80%_2

DIVIDE(
    [Z_QLDMUDA_PERFILHOSxMETRO] * [Z_QLDMUDA_PERFILHOSxALTURA]
    ,
    2
) * 0.8
MedidaAGRO_QLD_OPERAC.Z_QLDOPERAC_IDCOR

IF([Z_QLDOPERC_ADER]=BLANK(),0,
    IF([Z_QLDOPERC_ADER]>=AVERAGE(AGRO_QLD_OPERAC[QLD_META_ADERENCIA]),2,1))
MedidaAGRO_QLD_OPERAC.Z_QLDOPERAC_IDCOR_ANO

IF([Z_QLDOPERC_ADER_ANO]=BLANK(),0,
    IF([Z_QLDOPERC_ADER_ANO]>=AVERAGE(AGRO_QLD_OPERAC[QLD_META_ADERENCIA]),2,1))
MedidaAGRO_QLD_OPERAC.Z_QLDOPERAC_IDCOR_MES

IF([Z_QLDOPERC_ADER_MES]=BLANK(),0,
    IF([Z_QLDOPERC_ADER_MES]>=AVERAGE(AGRO_QLD_OPERAC[QLD_META_ADERENCIA]),2,1))
MedidaAGRO_QLD_OPERAC.Z_QLDOPERAC_IDCOR_SEMANTERIOR

IF([Z_QLDOPERC_ADER_SEMANTERIOR]=BLANK(),0,
    IF([Z_QLDOPERC_ADER_SEMANTERIOR]>=AVERAGE(AGRO_QLD_OPERAC[QLD_META_ADERENCIA]),2,1))
MedidaAGRO_QLD_OPERAC.Z_QLDOPERAC_IDCOR_SEMATUAL

IF([Z_QLDOPERC_ADER_SEMATUAL]=BLANK(),0,
    IF([Z_QLDOPERC_ADER_SEMATUAL]>=AVERAGE(AGRO_QLD_OPERAC[QLD_META_ADERENCIA]),2,1))
MedidaAGRO_QLD_OPERAC.Z_QLDOPERC_ADER

VAR OPER = SELECTEDVALUE(AGRO_QLD_OPERAC[DE_OPERACAO])
VAR INDI = SELECTEDVALUE(AGRO_QLD_OPERAC[CD_INDICADOR])

RETURN
IF(AND(INDI = 1, OPER = "162-Fertirrigação"),
    CALCULATE(AVERAGE(AGRO_QLD_OPERAC[VL_REAL]),
                FILTER(AGRO_QLD_OPERAC,AGRO_QLD_OPERAC[DE_OPERACAO]="162-Fertirrigação" && AGRO_QLD_OPERAC[CD_INDICADOR] = 1)
    ),
IF(AND(INDI = 1, OPER = "163-Irrigação"),
    CALCULATE(AVERAGE(AGRO_QLD_OPERAC[VL_REAL]),
                FILTER(AGRO_QLD_OPERAC,AGRO_QLD_OPERAC[DE_OPERACAO]="163-Irrigação" && AGRO_QLD_OPERAC[CD_INDICADOR] = 1)
            ),
IF(ISBLANK(SUM('AGRO_QLD_OPERAC'[QTDE_PONTO_CALC])),BLANK(),
    DIVIDE( SUM('AGRO_QLD_OPERAC'[QTDE_PONTO_ADERENTE]),
            SUM('AGRO_QLD_OPERAC'[QTDE_PONTO_CALC])
    )
)))
MedidaAGRO_QLD_OPERAC.Z_QLDOPERC_ADER_ANO

IF(ISBLANK(CALCULATE(
            SUM('AGRO_QLD_OPERAC'[QTDE_PONTO_CALC]),
            DATESBETWEEN(AGRO_QLD_OPERAC[DT_AMOSTRA],
                    DATE(YEAR(NOW()),1,1),
                    FORMAT(NOW(),"DD/MM/YYYY")
            ))),BLANK(),
    DIVIDE(
        CALCULATE(
            SUM('AGRO_QLD_OPERAC'[QTDE_PONTO_ADERENTE]),
            DATESBETWEEN(AGRO_QLD_OPERAC[DT_AMOSTRA],
                    DATE(YEAR(NOW()),1,1),
                    FORMAT(NOW(),"DD/MM/YYYY")
            )
        ),
        CALCULATE(
            SUM('AGRO_QLD_OPERAC'[QTDE_PONTO_CALC]),
            DATESBETWEEN(AGRO_QLD_OPERAC[DT_AMOSTRA],
                    DATE(YEAR(NOW()),1,1),
                    FORMAT(NOW(),"DD/MM/YYYY")
            )
        )
    )
)
MedidaAGRO_QLD_OPERAC.Z_QLDOPERC_ADER_MES

IF(ISBLANK(CALCULATE(
            SUM('AGRO_QLD_OPERAC'[QTDE_PONTO_CALC]),
            DATESBETWEEN(AGRO_QLD_OPERAC[DT_AMOSTRA],
                    EOMONTH(NOW(),-1)+1,
                    FORMAT(NOW(),"DD/MM/YYYY")
            ))),BLANK(),
    DIVIDE(
        CALCULATE(
            SUM('AGRO_QLD_OPERAC'[QTDE_PONTO_ADERENTE]),
            DATESBETWEEN(AGRO_QLD_OPERAC[DT_AMOSTRA],
                    EOMONTH(NOW(),-1)+1,
                    FORMAT(NOW(),"DD/MM/YYYY")
            )
        ),
        CALCULATE(
            SUM('AGRO_QLD_OPERAC'[QTDE_PONTO_CALC]),
            DATESBETWEEN(AGRO_QLD_OPERAC[DT_AMOSTRA],
                    EOMONTH(NOW(),-1)+1,
                    FORMAT(NOW(),"DD/MM/YYYY")
            )
        )
    )
)
MedidaAGRO_QLD_OPERAC.Z_QLDOPERC_ADER_SEMANTERIOR

IF(ISBLANK(CALCULATE(
            SUM('AGRO_QLD_OPERAC'[QTDE_PONTO_CALC]),
            DATESBETWEEN(AGRO_QLD_OPERAC[DT_AMOSTRA],
                    FORMAT(NOW()-WEEKDAY(NOW(),2)+1-7,"DD/MM/YYYY"),
                    FORMAT(NOW()-WEEKDAY(NOW(),2),"DD/MM/YYYY")
            ))),BLANK(),
    DIVIDE(
        CALCULATE(
            SUM('AGRO_QLD_OPERAC'[QTDE_PONTO_ADERENTE]),
            DATESBETWEEN(AGRO_QLD_OPERAC[DT_AMOSTRA],
                    FORMAT(NOW()-WEEKDAY(NOW(),2)+1-7,"DD/MM/YYYY"),
                    FORMAT(NOW()-WEEKDAY(NOW(),2),"DD/MM/YYYY")
            )
        ),
        CALCULATE(
            SUM('AGRO_QLD_OPERAC'[QTDE_PONTO_CALC]),
            DATESBETWEEN(AGRO_QLD_OPERAC[DT_AMOSTRA],
                    FORMAT(NOW()-WEEKDAY(NOW(),2)+1-7,"DD/MM/YYYY"),
                    FORMAT(NOW()-WEEKDAY(NOW(),2),"DD/MM/YYYY")
            )
        )
    )
)
MedidaAGRO_QLD_OPERAC.Z_QLDOPERC_ADER_SEMATUAL

IF(ISBLANK(CALCULATE(
            SUM('AGRO_QLD_OPERAC'[QTDE_PONTO_CALC]),
            DATESBETWEEN(AGRO_QLD_OPERAC[DT_AMOSTRA],
                    FORMAT(NOW()-WEEKDAY(NOW(),2)+1,"DD/MM/YYYY"),

                    FORMAT(NOW(),"DD/MM/YYYY")
            )
        )
    )
)

IF(ISBLANK(CALCULATE(

MedidaAGRO_QLD_OPERAC_GEMAS.Z_AGRO_QLD_GEMAS_GEMA_METRO

DIVIDE(
    CALCULATE(AVERAGE(AGRO_QLD_OPERAC_GEMAS[VL_ANALISE])),
    2
)
MedidaAGRO_QLD_OPERAC_GEMAS.Z_AGRO_QLD_GEMAS_PERC

DIVIDE(SUM([VL_ANALISE]),
        CALCULATE(SUM([VL_ANALISE]),
                ALLCROSSFILTERED(AGRO_QLD_OPERAC_GEMAS)
                )
)
MedidaAGRO_QLD_OPERAC_GEMAS.Z_AGRO_QLD_GEMA_PERC_FAZENDA_FRENTE

DIVIDE(SUM([VL_ANALISE]),
        CALCULATE(SUM([VL_ANALISE]),
                ALLSELECTED(AGRO_QLD_OPERAC_GEMAS[DE_INDICADOR_2])

                )
)
MedidaAGRO_SPHENOPHORUS.Z_AGRO_SPHENOPHORUS_LEGENDA

IF(DIVIDE(SUM([QT_RIZOMAS_ATAC]),SUM([QT_TT_RIZOMAS])) <= [Z_AGRO_SPHENOPHORUS_META],
    "<= " & FORMAT([Z_AGRO_SPHENOPHORUS_META],"0.00%") & " Toco atacado",
    "> " & FORMAT([Z_AGRO_SPHENOPHORUS_META],"0.00%") & " Toco atacado")
MedidaAGRO_SPHENOPHORUS.Z_AGRO_SPHENOPHORUS_META
0.007
MedidaAGRO_SPHENOPHORUS.Z_AGRO_SPHENOPHORUS_REAL

IF(SUM([QT_TT_RIZOMAS])=0,0,DIVIDE(SUM([QT_RIZOMAS_ATAC]),SUM([QT_TT_RIZOMAS])))
MedidaAGRO_SPHENOPHORUS.Z_AGRO_SPHENOPHORUS_REAL_TAMANHO

IF(SUM([QT_TT_RIZOMAS])=0,0.001,DIVIDE(SUM([QT_RIZOMAS_ATAC]),SUM([QT_TT_RIZOMAS])) * 100)
MedidaCARREADORES.Z_CARREADOR_AREA_TOTAL

CALCULATE(SUM([QT_AREA_CARREADOR]),
    ALLCROSSFILTERED(CARREADORES)
)
MedidaCARREADORES.Z_CARREADOR_DIAS

IFERROR(DIVIDE(SUM([POND_DIAS]), SUM([QT_AREA_CARREADOR])),0)
MedidaCARREADORES.Z_TALHOES

--VAR TLH = CONCATENATEX(CARREADORES,CARREADORES[TLH],", ",CARREADORES[CD_UP3],ASC)
VAR TLH = CONCATENATEX(CARREADORES, CARREADORES[CD_UP3], ", ", CARREADORES[CD_UP3], ASC)
RETURN
SWITCH(
    TRUE(),
    ISINSCOPE(CARREADORES[FAZENDA]),TLH
)
MedidaCARREADOR_TLH.Z_CARREADOR_DIAS_PENDENTES

DIVIDE(SUM(CARREADOR_TLH[DIAS_PENDENTE_POND]), SUM(CARREADOR_TLH[QT_AREA]))
MedidaCARREADOR_TLH.Z_CARREADOR_DIAS_REALIZADO

DIVIDE(SUM(CARREADOR_TLH[DIAS_REALIZADO_POND]), SUM(CARREADOR_TLH[QT_AREA]))
MedidaCARREADOR_TLH.Z_CARREADOR_TLH_TALHOES

VAR TLH = CONCATENATEX(CARREADOR_TLH,VALUE(CARREADOR_TLH[CD_UPNIVEL3]),", ",CARREADOR_TLH[CD_UPNIVEL3],ASC)
RETURN
SWITCH(
    TRUE(),
    ISINSCOPE(CARREADOR_TLH[FAZENDA]),TLH
)
MedidaCATAÇÃO_TLH.Z_CATAÇÃO_DIAS_PENDENTE_CALC

DIVIDE(SUM('CATAÇÃO_TLH'[DIAS_PENDENTE_POND]), SUM('CATAÇÃO_TLH'[QT_AREA]))
MedidaCATAÇÃO_TLH.Z_CATAÇÃO_DIAS_REALIZADO_CALC

DIVIDE(SUM('CATAÇÃO_TLH'[DIAS_REALIZADO_POND]), SUM('CATAÇÃO_TLH'[QT_AREA]))
MedidaCATAÇÃO_TLH.Z_CATAÇÃO_TLH_TALHOES

VAR TLH = CONCATENATEX('CATAÇÃO_TLH',VALUE('CATAÇÃO_TLH'[CD_UPNIVEL3]),", ",'CATAÇÃO_TLH'[CD_UPNIVEL3],ASC)
RETURN
SWITCH(
    TRUE(),
    ISINSCOPE('CATAÇÃO_TLH'[FAZENDA]),TLH
)
MedidaCHUVA.QTDE_ANO_ATUAL

    CALCULATE(SUM(CHUVA[QTDE]),
                DATESBETWEEN(CHUVA[DT_OPERACAO],
                                FORMAT(DATE(YEAR(NOW()),1,1),"DD/MM/YYYY"),
                                FORMAT(NOW()+7-WEEKDAY(NOW(),2),"DD/MM/YYYY")))
MedidaCHUVA.QTDE_CHUVA_MÉD
DIVIDE(SUM(CHUVA[QTDE]),SUM(CHUVA[DIAS_COM_CHUVA]))
MedidaCHUVA.QTDE_ONTEM

IF(ISBLANK(
    CALCULATE(SUM(CHUVA[QTDE]),
                DATESBETWEEN(CHUVA[DT_OPERACAO],
                                FORMAT(NOW()-1,"DD/MM/YYYY"),
                                FORMAT(NOW()-1,"DD/MM/YYYY")))),0,
        CALCULATE(SUM(CHUVA[QTDE]),
                DATESBETWEEN(CHUVA[DT_OPERACAO],
                                FORMAT(NOW()-1,"DD/MM/YYYY"),
                                FORMAT(NOW()-1,"DD/MM/YYYY")))
)
MedidaCHUVA.QTDE_SEMANA_ATUAL

IF(ISBLANK(
    CALCULATE(SUM(CHUVA[QTDE]),
                DATESBETWEEN(CHUVA[DT_OPERACAO],
                                FORMAT(NOW()+7-WEEKDAY(NOW(),2),"DD/MM/YYYY")-6,
                                FORMAT(NOW()+7-WEEKDAY(NOW(),2),"DD/MM/YYYY")))),0,
        CALCULATE(SUM(CHUVA[QTDE]),
                DATESBETWEEN(CHUVA[DT_OPERACAO],
                                FORMAT(NOW()+7-WEEKDAY(NOW(),2),"DD/MM/YYYY")-6,
                                FORMAT(NOW()+7-WEEKDAY(NOW(),2),"DD/MM/YYYY")))
)
MedidaCHUVA.QTDE_SEMANA_ULT

IF(ISBLANK(
    CALCULATE(SUM(CHUVA[QTDE]),
                DATESBETWEEN(CHUVA[DT_OPERACAO],
                                FORMAT(NOW()-WEEKDAY(NOW(),2),"DD/MM/YYYY")-6,
                                FORMAT(NOW()-WEEKDAY(NOW(),2),"DD/MM/YYYY")))),0,
        CALCULATE(SUM(CHUVA[QTDE]),
                DATESBETWEEN(CHUVA[DT_OPERACAO],
                                FORMAT(NOW()-WEEKDAY(NOW(),2),"DD/MM/YYYY")-6,
                                FORMAT(NOW()-WEEKDAY(NOW(),2),"DD/MM/YYYY")))
)
MedidaCOMPOSTO_ESTOQ_DT.QT_ESTOQUE_META
16000
MedidaCOMPOSTO_ESTOQ_DT.QT_TRANSPORTADO

CALCULATE(SUM(COMPOSTO_ESTOQ_DT[QT_SAI]),
            COMPOSTO_ESTOQ_DT[DT] >= DATE(2025,2,1))
MedidaCOMPOSTO_ESTOQ_DT.QT_TRANSPORTE_META
75444.5
MedidaCOMPOSTO_ESTOQ_DT.QT_TRANSPORTE_META_MAX

[QT_TRANSPORTE_META] * 1.4
MedidaCTT_BROCA.Z_CTT_BROCA_META

IF(MIN(CTT_DATA[DT])<=DATE(2022,12,31),1.7,1.0)/100
MedidaCTT_BROCA.Z_CTT_BROCA_TOTAL

DIVIDE(
    SUM(CTT_BROCA[KG_CANA_BROCA])
    ,
    SUM(CTT_BROCA[KG_CANA_ENT])
)
MedidaCTT_BROCA.Z_CTT_BROCA_TOTAL_ANO

VAR DTINI = [DT_SAFRA_INI]
//VAR DTINI = EOMONTH(MAX(X_DATA[DT]),-1)+1
//VAR DTINI = MAX(X_DATA[DT]) + 0 - WEEKDAY(MAX(X_DATA[DT]),3)
VAR DTFIM = MAX(X_DATA[DT])
RETURN
DIVIDE(
        CALCULATE(SUM(CTT_BROCA[KG_CANA_BROCA]),
                    FILTER(ALL(CTT_BROCA), CTT_BROCA[DT_HISTORICO] >= DTINI),
                    FILTER(ALL(CTT_BROCA), CTT_BROCA[DT_HISTORICO] <= DTFIM),
                    FILTERS(CTT_BROCA[FAZENDA])
                )
    ,
        CALCULATE(SUM(CTT_BROCA[KG_CANA_ENT]),
                        FILTER(ALL(CTT_BROCA), CTT_BROCA[DT_HISTORICO] >= DTINI),
                    FILTER(ALL(CTT_BROCA), CTT_BROCA[DT_HISTORICO] <= DTFIM),
                    FILTERS(CTT_BROCA[FAZENDA])
                )
)
MedidaCTT_BROCA.Z_CTT_BROCA_TOTAL_IDCOR

IF(CTT_BROCA[Z_CTT_BROCA_TOTAL]<=CTT_BROCA[Z_CTT_BROCA_META],2,1)
MedidaCTT_BROCA.Z_CTT_BROCA_TOTAL_MES

//VAR DTINI = [DT_SAFRA_INI]
VAR DTINI = EOMONTH(MAX(X_DATA[DT]),-1)+1
//VAR DTINI = MAX(X_DATA[DT]) + 0 - WEEKDAY(MAX(X_DATA[DT]),3)
VAR DTFIM = MAX(X_DATA[DT])
RETURN
DIVIDE(
        CALCULATE(SUM(CTT_BROCA[KG_CANA_BROCA]),
                    FILTER(ALL(CTT_BROCA), CTT_BROCA[DT_HISTORICO] >= DTINI),
                    FILTER(ALL(CTT_BROCA), CTT_BROCA[DT_HISTORICO] <= DTFIM),
                    FILTERS(CTT_BROCA[FAZENDA])
                )
    ,
        CALCULATE(SUM(CTT_BROCA[KG_CANA_ENT]),
                        FILTER(ALL(CTT_BROCA), CTT_BROCA[DT_HISTORICO] >= DTINI),
                    FILTER(ALL(CTT_BROCA), CTT_BROCA[DT_HISTORICO] <= DTFIM),
                    FILTERS(CTT_BROCA[FAZENDA])
                )
)
MedidaCTT_BROCA.Z_CTT_BROCA_TOTAL_SEMANA

//VAR DTINI = [DT_SAFRA_INI]
//VAR DTINI = EOMONTH(MAX(X_DATA[DT]),-1)+1
VAR DTINI = MAX(X_DATA[DT]) + 0 - WEEKDAY(MAX(X_DATA[DT]),3)
VAR DTFIM = MAX(X_DATA[DT])
RETURN
DIVIDE(
        CALCULATE(SUM(CTT_BROCA[KG_CANA_BROCA]),
                    FILTER(ALL(CTT_BROCA), CTT_BROCA[DT_HISTORICO] >= DTINI),
                    FILTER(ALL(CTT_BROCA), CTT_BROCA[DT_HISTORICO] <= DTFIM),
                    FILTERS(CTT_BROCA[FAZENDA])
                )
    ,
        CALCULATE(SUM(CTT_BROCA[KG_CANA_ENT]),
                        FILTER(ALL(CTT_BROCA), CTT_BROCA[DT_HISTORICO] >= DTINI),
                    FILTER(ALL(CTT_BROCA), CTT_BROCA[DT_HISTORICO] <= DTFIM),
                    FILTERS(CTT_BROCA[FAZENDA])
                )
)
MedidaCTT_CARGAS_ENTRADA.Z_CTT_ENTRADA_CARGAS

IF(VALUE(LEFT(SELECTEDVALUE(CTT_CARGAS_ENTRADA_VISAO_PARAM[VISAO]),1))=1,
    CALCULATE(
        SUM(CTT_CARGAS_ENTRADA[QT_CARGA]),
        FILTER(CTT_CARGAS_ENTRADA,CTT_CARGAS_ENTRADA[DT_ENTRADA]<=MIN(CTT_DATA[DT])),
        FILTER(CTT_DTHRFREN,CTT_DTHRFREN[ORD_HR]<=SELECTEDVALUE(CTT_CARGAS_ENTRADA_VISAO_PARAM[HR])),
        FILTER(CTT_HORA24H,CTT_HORA24H[ORD_HR]<=SELECTEDVALUE(CTT_CARGAS_ENTRADA_VISAO_PARAM[HR]))
    ),
    CALCULATE(
        SUM(CTT_CARGAS_ENTRADA[QT_CARGA]),
        FILTER(CTT_CARGAS_ENTRADA,CTT_CARGAS_ENTRADA[DT_ENTRADA]<=MIN(CTT_DATA[DT]))
    )
)
MedidaCTT_CARGAS_ENTRADA.Z_CTT_ENTRADA_CARGASPATIO

IF(ISBLANK(
        CALCULATE(SUM(CTT_CARGAS_ENTRADA[QT_CARGA_PATIO]),
                ALLCROSSFILTERED(CTT_CARGAS_ENTRADA),
                FILTER(FRENTRANSP,FRENTRANSP[CD_FREN_TRAN]=[CD_FREN_TRAN])
            )
        ),0,
        CALCULATE(SUM(CTT_CARGAS_ENTRADA[QT_CARGA_PATIO]),
                ALLCROSSFILTERED(CTT_CARGAS_ENTRADA),
                FILTER(FRENTRANSP,FRENTRANSP[CD_FREN_TRAN]=[CD_FREN_TRAN])
        )
)
MedidaCTT_CARGAS_ENTRADA.Z_CTT_ENTRADA_CARGMED_META_IDCOR

IF(AVERAGE(CTT_CARGAS_ENTRADA[TON_ESTIM])<[Z_CTT_SAIDA_CARGAMEDIA],1,2)
MedidaCTT_CARGAS_ENTRADA.Z_CTT_ENTRADA_FILTRO_FRENTE

IF(CTT_META_MOAGEM[Z_CTT_META_TONHR]>0,1,0)
+
IF(CTT_CARGAS_ENTRADA[Z_CTT_ENTRADA_TONHR]>0,1,0)
MedidaCTT_CARGAS_ENTRADA.Z_CTT_ENTRADA_HR

IF(VALUE(FORMAT(NOW(),"NN")) < 30,
    IF(VALUE(FORMAT(NOW(),"HH"))=0,17,
    IF(VALUE(FORMAT(NOW(),"HH"))>=7,VALUE(FORMAT(NOW(),"HH"))-7,
    17+VALUE(FORMAT(NOW(),"HH"))))
    ,
    IF(VALUE(FORMAT(NOW(),"HH"))=0,18,
    IF(VALUE(FORMAT(NOW(),"HH"))>=7,VALUE(FORMAT(NOW(),"HH"))-6,
    18+VALUE(FORMAT(NOW(),"HH"))))
)
MedidaCTT_CARGAS_ENTRADA.Z_CTT_ENTRADA_HR_DIA
"HORA"||"DIA"
MedidaCTT_CARGAS_ENTRADA.Z_CTT_ENTRADA_TONHR

IF(ISBLANK(CALCULATE(SUM(CTT_CARGAS_ENTRADA[TON_ESTIM]),ALL(FRENTRANSP[DE_FREN_TRAN]))),0,

    IF(VALUE(LEFT(SELECTEDVALUE(CTT_CARGAS_ENTRADA_VISAO_PARAM[VISAO]),1))=1,
        CALCULATE(
            SUM(CTT_CARGAS_ENTRADA[TON_ESTIM]),
            FILTER(CTT_CARGAS_ENTRADA,CTT_CARGAS_ENTRADA[DT_ENTRADA]<=MIN(CTT_DATA[DT])),
            FILTER(CTT_DTHRFREN,CTT_DTHRFREN[ORD_HR]<=
                SELECTEDVALUE(CTT_CARGAS_ENTRADA_VISAO_PARAM[HR])),
            FILTER(CTT_HORA24H,CTT_HORA24H[ORD_HR]<=
                    SELECTEDVALUE(CTT_CARGAS_ENTRADA_VISAO_PARAM[HR]))
        ),
        CALCULATE(
            SUM(CTT_CARGAS_ENTRADA[TON_ESTIM]),
            FILTER(CTT_CARGAS_ENTRADA,CTT_CARGAS_ENTRADA[DT_ENTRADA]<=MIN(CTT_DATA[DT]))
        )
    )
)

IF(CALCULATE(SUM(CTT_CARGAS_ENTRADA[TON_ESTIM]),
                CTT_CARGAS_ENTRADA[CD_FREN_TRAN]=1,
                ALLCROSSFILTERED(FRENTRANSP))=0,0,
    
    IF(VALUE(LEFT(SELECTEDVALUE(CTT_CARGAS_ENTRADA_VISAO_PARAM[VISAO]),1))=1,
        CALCULATE(SUM(CTT_CARGAS_ENTRADA[TON_ESTIM]),
            CTT_CARGAS_ENTRADA[DT_ENTRADA]<=MIN(CTT_DATA[DT]),
            CTT_CARGAS_ENTRADA[CD_FREN_TRAN]=1,

            CTT_CARGAS_ENTRADA[ORD_HR]<=SELECTEDVALUE(CTT_CARGAS_ENTRADA_VISAO_PARAM[HR])
        ),

            CTT_CARGAS_ENTRADA[DT_ENTRADA]<=MIN(CTT_DATA[DT]),
            CTT_CARGAS_ENTRADA[CD_FREN_TRAN]=1,
            ALL(FRENTRANSP[DE_FREN_TRAN])
        )
    )
)

MedidaCTT_CARGAS_SAIDA.Z_CTT_SAIDA_ATRID_FTOTAL

IF([Z_CTT_SAIDA_ATR_FTOTAL]>[Z_CTT_META_ATR_TOTAL],1,0)
MedidaCTT_CARGAS_SAIDA.Z_CTT_SAIDA_ATRPRE_FTOTAL

//BLANK()
IF(SUM(CTT_CARGAS_SAIDA[TON_POND_ATR_PRE])=0,0,
        DIVIDE(
            SUM(CTT_CARGAS_SAIDA[TON_POND_ATR_PRE]),
            CALCULATE(SUM(CTT_CARGAS_SAIDA[TON_ATR]),
                CTT_CARGAS_SAIDA[TON_POND_ATR_PRE]>0
            )
        )
)
MedidaCTT_CARGAS_SAIDA.Z_CTT_SAIDA_ATR_FTOTAL

IF(ISBLANK(CALCULATE(SUM(CTT_CARGAS_SAIDA[TON_EFET]),
                CTT_CARGAS_SAIDA[DT_MOV_ENT]<=MIN(CTT_DATA_FLT[DT]))),0,
        DIVIDE(
            CALCULATE(SUM(CTT_CARGAS_SAIDA[TON_POND_ATR]),
                CTT_CARGAS_SAIDA[DT_MOV_ENT]<=MIN(CTT_DATA_FLT[DT]),
                CTT_CARGAS_SAIDA[ATR]>0),
            CALCULATE(SUM(CTT_CARGAS_SAIDA[TON_ATR]),
                CTT_CARGAS_SAIDA[DT_MOV_ENT]<=MIN(CTT_DATA_FLT[DT]),
                CTT_CARGAS_SAIDA[ATR]>0)
            )
)
MedidaCTT_CARGAS_SAIDA.Z_CTT_SAIDA_CARGAMEDIA

VAR CARGMED_META_MES = MONTH(IF(HOUR(NOW())<7,INT(NOW())-1,INT(NOW())))

RETURN

IF(CARGMED_META_MES <=3, 34.55,
IF(CARGMED_META_MES <=4, 34.55,
IF(CARGMED_META_MES <=5, 34.55,
IF(CARGMED_META_MES <=6, 34.55,
IF(CARGMED_META_MES <=7, 34.55,
IF(CARGMED_META_MES <=8, 34.55,
IF(CARGMED_META_MES <=9, 34.55,
IF(CARGMED_META_MES <=10, 34.55,
IF(CARGMED_META_MES <=11, 34.55, 32.08)))))))))
MedidaCTT_CARGAS_SAIDA.Z_CTT_SAIDA_CARGMEDID_FTOTAL

IF([Z_CTT_SAIDA_CARGMED_FTOTAL]>=[Z_CTT_SAIDA_CARGAMEDIA],1,0)
MedidaCTT_CARGAS_SAIDA.Z_CTT_SAIDA_CARGMED_FTOTAL

VAR TP1 = LEFT(SELECTEDVALUE(CTT_CARGAS_ENTRADA_VISAO_PARAM[VISAO]),1)
VAR TP2 = SELECTEDVALUE(CTT_DATA_FLT[DT])
RETURN
IF(ISBLANK(CALCULATE(AVERAGE(CTT_CARGAS_SAIDA[TON_EFET]),
                CTT_CARGAS_SAIDA[DT_MOV_ENT]<=TP2)),0,
    IF(VALUE(TP1)=1,
        CALCULATE(AVERAGE(CTT_CARGAS_SAIDA[TON_EFET]),
            CTT_CARGAS_SAIDA[DT_MOV_ENT]<=TP2,
            CTT_CARGAS_SAIDA[ORD_HR]<=SELECTEDVALUE(CTT_CARGAS_ENTRADA_VISAO_PARAM[HR])
        )
        ,
        CALCULATE(AVERAGE(CTT_CARGAS_SAIDA[TON_EFET]),
            CTT_CARGAS_SAIDA[DT_MOV_ENT]<=TP2)
    )
)
MedidaCTT_CARGAS_SAIDA.Z_CTT_SAIDA_CARGPATIO_FTOTAL

IF(ISBLANK(
            CALCULATE(SUM(CTT_CARGAS_SAIDA[QT_CARGA_PATIO]),
                ALLCROSSFILTERED(CTT_CARGAS_SAIDA))
            ),0,
            CALCULATE(SUM(CTT_CARGAS_SAIDA[QT_CARGA_PATIO]),
                ALLCROSSFILTERED(CTT_CARGAS_SAIDA))
)
MedidaCTT_CARGAS_SAIDA.Z_CTT_SAIDA_CARGPATIO_FTOTAL2

/*ISINSCOPE(FRENTRANSP[DE_FREN_TRAN])*/
IF(ISBLANK(
            CALCULATE(SUM(CTT_CARGAS_SAIDA[QT_CARGA_PATIO]),
                    ALLCROSSFILTERED(CTT_DATA),
                    FILTER(FRENTRANSP,FRENTRANSP[CD_FREN_TRAN]=[CD_FREN_TRAN])
                )
            ),0,
            CALCULATE(SUM(CTT_CARGAS_SAIDA[QT_CARGA_PATIO]),
                    ALLCROSSFILTERED(CTT_DATA),
                    FILTER(FRENTRANSP,FRENTRANSP[CD_FREN_TRAN]=[CD_FREN_TRAN])
                )
)
MedidaCTT_CARGAS_SAIDA.Z_CTT_SAIDA_HR

IF(VALUE(FORMAT(NOW(),"NN")) < 30,
IF(VALUE(FORMAT(NOW(),"HH"))=0,17,
IF(VALUE(FORMAT(NOW(),"HH"))>=7,VALUE(FORMAT(NOW(),"HH"))-7,
17+VALUE(FORMAT(NOW(),"HH"))))
,
IF(VALUE(FORMAT(NOW(),"HH"))=0,18,
IF(VALUE(FORMAT(NOW(),"HH"))>=7,VALUE(FORMAT(NOW(),"HH"))-6,
18+VALUE(FORMAT(NOW(),"HH"))))
)
MedidaCTT_CARGAS_SAIDA.Z_CTT_SAIDA_KM_FTOTAL

VAR TP1 = LEFT(SELECTEDVALUE(CTT_CARGAS_ENTRADA_VISAO_PARAM[VISAO]),1)
VAR TP2 = SELECTEDVALUE(CTT_DATA_FLT[DT])
RETURN
IF(ISBLANK(CALCULATE(SUM(CTT_CARGAS_SAIDA[KM_POND]),
                CTT_CARGAS_SAIDA[DT_MOV_ENT]<=TP2)),0,
    IF(VALUE(TP1)=1,
        DIVIDE(
            CALCULATE(SUM(CTT_CARGAS_SAIDA[KM_POND]),
                CTT_CARGAS_SAIDA[DT_MOV_ENT]<=TP2,
                CTT_CARGAS_SAIDA[ORD_HR]<=SELECTEDVALUE(CTT_CARGAS_ENTRADA_VISAO_PARAM[HR])),
            CALCULATE(SUM(CTT_CARGAS_SAIDA[TON_EFET]),
                CTT_CARGAS_SAIDA[DT_MOV_ENT]<=TP2,
                CTT_CARGAS_SAIDA[ORD_HR]<=SELECTEDVALUE(CTT_CARGAS_ENTRADA_VISAO_PARAM[HR]))
        ),
        DIVIDE(
            CALCULATE(SUM(CTT_CARGAS_SAIDA[KM_POND]),
                CTT_CARGAS_SAIDA[DT_MOV_ENT]<=TP2),
            CALCULATE(SUM(CTT_CARGAS_SAIDA[TON_EFET]),
                CTT_CARGAS_SAIDA[DT_MOV_ENT]<=TP2)
        )
    )
)
MedidaCTT_CARGAS_SAIDA.Z_CTT_SAIDA_MINEID_FTOTAL

IF([Z_CTT_SAIDA_MINE_FTOTAL]<=[Z_CTT_META_MINE_TOTAL],1,0)
MedidaCTT_CARGAS_SAIDA.Z_CTT_SAIDA_MINE_FTOTAL

VAR TP1 = LEFT(SELECTEDVALUE(CTT_CARGAS_ENTRADA_VISAO_PARAM[VISAO]),1)
VAR TP2 = SELECTEDVALUE(CTT_DATA_FLT[DT])
RETURN
IF(CALCULATE(SUM(CTT_CARGAS_SAIDA[TON_TERRA]),
                CTT_CARGAS_SAIDA[DT_MOV_ENT]<=TP2)=0,0,
    IF(VALUE(TP1)=1,
        DIVIDE(
            CALCULATE(SUM(CTT_CARGAS_SAIDA[TON_POND_TERRA]),
                CTT_CARGAS_SAIDA[DT_MOV_ENT]<=TP2,
                CTT_CARGAS_SAIDA[ORD_HR]<=SELECTEDVALUE(CTT_CARGAS_ENTRADA_VISAO_PARAM[HR])),
            CALCULATE(SUM(CTT_CARGAS_SAIDA[TON_TERRA]),
                CTT_CARGAS_SAIDA[DT_MOV_ENT]<=TP2,
                CTT_CARGAS_SAIDA[ORD_HR]<=SELECTEDVALUE(CTT_CARGAS_ENTRADA_VISAO_PARAM[HR]))
        ),
        DIVIDE(
            CALCULATE(SUM(CTT_CARGAS_SAIDA[TON_POND_TERRA]),
                CTT_CARGAS_SAIDA[DT_MOV_ENT]<=TP2),
            CALCULATE(SUM(CTT_CARGAS_SAIDA[TON_TERRA]),
                CTT_CARGAS_SAIDA[DT_MOV_ENT]<=TP2)
        )
    )
)*10
MedidaCTT_CARGAS_SAIDA.Z_CTT_SAIDA_TON_F01

                CTT_CARGAS_SAIDA[DT_MOV_ENT]<=MIN(CTT_DATA[DT]),

VAR TP1 = LEFT(SELECTEDVALUE(CTT_CARGAS_ENTRADA_VISAO_PARAM[VISAO]),1)

RETURN

                CTT_CARGAS_SAIDA[DT_MOV_ENT]<=TP2)=0,0,
    IF(VALUE(TP1)=1,
        DIVIDE(
            CALCULATE(SUM(CTT_CARGAS_SAIDA[TON_POND_VEGETAL]),
                CTT_CARGAS_SAIDA[DT_MOV_ENT]<=TP2,
                CTT_CARGAS_SAIDA[ORD_HR]<=SELECTEDVALUE(CTT_CARGAS_ENTRADA_VISAO_PARAM[HR])),
            CALCULATE(SUM(CTT_CARGAS_SAIDA[TON_VEGETAL]),
                CTT_CARGAS_SAIDA[DT_MOV_ENT]<=TP2,
                CTT_CARGAS_SAIDA[ORD_HR]<=SELECTEDVALUE(CTT_CARGAS_ENTRADA_VISAO_PARAM[HR]))
        ),
        DIVIDE(
            CALCULATE(SUM(CTT_CARGAS_SAIDA[TON_POND_VEGETAL]),
                CTT_CARGAS_SAIDA[DT_MOV_ENT]<=TP2),
            CALCULATE(SUM(CTT_CARGAS_SAIDA[TON_VEGETAL]),
                CTT_CARGAS_SAIDA[DT_MOV_ENT]<=TP2)
        )
    )
)*10

                CTT_CARGAS_SAIDA[DT_MOV_ENT]<=MIN(CTT_DATA[DT])
                )),0,

                CTT_CARGAS_SAIDA[DT_MOV_ENT]<=MIN(CTT_DATA[DT]),

                CTT_CARGAS_SAIDA[DT_MOV_ENT]<=MIN(CTT_DATA[DT])

            ),

            )
        )
    )
)
MedidaCTT_DATA.Z_CTT_DATA_ANOSAFRA
2026
MedidaCTT_DATA.Z_CTT_DATA_META

VAR AREA = CALCULATE(MAX(CTT_DATA[CTT_AREA_PLANO]),CTT_DATA[DT] <= (INT(NOW())))
RETURN
IF(ISBLANK(AREA),BLANK(),
    FORMAT(INT(NOW()),"DD/MM/YY") & "  |  " &
    FORMAT(AREA,"0,0.0") & " ha"
)
MedidaCTT_DATA.Z_CTT_DATA_META_ACM

FORMAT(
    LOOKUPVALUE(CTT_DATA[DT],CTT_DATA[CTT_AREA_PLANO],MAX(CTT_DATA[CTT_AREA_PLANO]))
    ,"DD/MM/YY") & "  |  " &
FORMAT(
    MAX(CTT_DATA[CTT_AREA_PLANO]),"0,0.0") & " ha"
MedidaCTT_DATA.Z_CTT_DATA_PROJETADO

VAR AREA = CALCULATE(MAX(CTT_DATA[CTT_AREA_PROJETA]), CTT_DATA[DT_GRAFICO] = "S")
RETURN
IF(ISBLANK(AREA), BLANK(),
    FORMAT(
        CALCULATE(MAX(CTT_DATA[DT]), CTT_DATA[DT_GRAFICO] = "S")
        ,"DD/MM/YY") & "  |  " &
    FORMAT(AREA,"0,0.0") & " ha"
)
MedidaCTT_DATA.Z_CTT_DATA_REAL

VAR AREA = CALCULATE(MAX(CTT_DATA[CTT_AREA_REAL]),CTT_DATA[DT] <= (INT(NOW())))
RETURN
IF(ISBLANK(AREA), BLANK(),
    FORMAT(INT(NOW()),"DD/MM/YY") & "  |  " &
    FORMAT(AREA,"0,0.0") & " ha"
)
MedidaCTT_ENTRADA_SAIDA.Z_ENTSAI_ENT_IDCOR

IF(SUM(CTT_ENTRADA_SAIDA[CARGA_ENTRADA])<17,3,
IF(SUM(CTT_ENTRADA_SAIDA[CARGA_ENTRADA])>20,2,1))
MedidaCTT_ENTRADA_SAIDA.Z_ENTSAI_SAI_IDCOR

IF(SUM(CTT_ENTRADA_SAIDA[CARGA_SAIDA])<17,3,
IF(SUM(CTT_ENTRADA_SAIDA[CARGA_SAIDA])>20,2,1))
MedidaCTT_HISTPRD.Z_CTT_HISTPRD_ATR_ANO

VAR DTINI = [DT_SAFRA_INI]
//VAR DTINI = EOMONTH(MAX(X_DATA[DT]),-1)+1
//VAR DTINI = MAX(X_DATA[DT]) + 0 - WEEKDAY(MAX(X_DATA[DT]),3)
VAR DTFIM = MAX(X_DATA[DT])
RETURN
DIVIDE(
        CALCULATE(SUM(CTT_HISTPRD[KG_ACUCAR]),
                    FILTER(CTT_HISTPRD, CTT_HISTPRD[DT_HISTORICO] >= DTINI),
                    FILTER(CTT_HISTPRD, CTT_HISTPRD[DT_HISTORICO] <= DTFIM)
                ),
        CALCULATE(SUM(CTT_HISTPRD[QT_CANA_ENT]),
                    FILTER(CTT_HISTPRD, CTT_HISTPRD[KG_ACUCAR]>0),
                    FILTER(CTT_HISTPRD, CTT_HISTPRD[DT_HISTORICO] >= DTINI),
                    FILTER(CTT_HISTPRD, CTT_HISTPRD[DT_HISTORICO] <= DTFIM)
                )
)
MedidaCTT_HISTPRD.Z_CTT_HISTPRD_ATR_ANO_IDCOR

IF([Z_CTT_HISTPRD_ATR_ANO]>=[Z_CTT_META_R_ATR_ANO],1,2)

RETURN

        CALCULATE(SUM(CTT_HISTPRD[KG_ACUCAR]),
                    FILTER(CTT_HISTPRD, CTT_HISTPRD[DT_HISTORICO] >= DTINI),
                    FILTER(CTT_HISTPRD, CTT_HISTPRD[DT_HISTORICO] <= DTFIM)
                ),
        CALCULATE(SUM(CTT_HISTPRD[QT_CANA_ENT]),
                    FILTER(CTT_HISTPRD, CTT_HISTPRD[KG_ACUCAR]>0),
                    FILTER(CTT_HISTPRD, CTT_HISTPRD[DT_HISTORICO] >= DTINI),
                    FILTER(CTT_HISTPRD, CTT_HISTPRD[DT_HISTORICO] <= DTFIM)

)

IF(CTT_META_REUNIAO[Z_CTT_META_R_MINE_MES]>=[Z_CTT_HISTPRD_KGTERRA_MES],1,2)
MedidaCTT_HISTPRD.Z_CTT_HISTPRD_KGTERRA_SEMANA

//VAR DTINI = [DT_SAFRA_INI]
//VAR DTINI = EOMONTH(MAX(X_DATA[DT]),-1)+1
VAR DTINI = MAX(X_DATA[DT]) + 0 - WEEKDAY(MAX(X_DATA[DT]),3)
VAR DTFIM = MAX(X_DATA[DT])
RETURN
DIVIDE(CALCULATE(SUM(CTT_HISTPRD[QT_IMPUR_TERRA]),
            FILTER(CTT_HISTPRD,CTT_HISTPRD[DT_HISTORICO] >= DTINI),
            FILTER(CTT_HISTPRD,CTT_HISTPRD[DT_HISTORICO] <= DTFIM)
        ),
       CALCULATE(SUM(CTT_HISTPRD[QT_CANA_TERRA]),
            FILTER(CTT_HISTPRD,CTT_HISTPRD[DT_HISTORICO] >= DTINI),
            FILTER(CTT_HISTPRD,CTT_HISTPRD[DT_HISTORICO] <= DTFIM)
        )
)
MedidaCTT_HISTPRD.Z_CTT_HISTPRD_KGTERRA_SEMANA_IDCOR

IF(CTT_META_REUNIAO[Z_CTT_META_R_MINE_SEMANA]>=[Z_CTT_HISTPRD_KGTERRA_SEMANA],1,2)
MedidaCTT_HISTPRD.Z_CTT_HISTPRD_KGVEGETAL

DIVIDE(SUM(CTT_HISTPRD[QT_IMPUR_VEG]),SUM(CTT_HISTPRD[QT_CANA_VEGETAL]))
MedidaCTT_HISTPRD.Z_CTT_HISTPRD_KGVEGETAL_ANO

VAR DTINI = DATE(2025,3,1)
//VAR DTINI = EOMONTH(MAX(X_DATA[DT]),-1)+1
//VAR DTINI = MAX(X_DATA[DT]) + 0 - WEEKDAY(MAX(X_DATA[DT]),3)
VAR DTFIM = MAX(X_DATA[DT])
RETURN
DIVIDE(CALCULATE(SUM(CTT_HISTPRD[QT_IMPUR_VEG]),
            FILTER(CTT_HISTPRD,CTT_HISTPRD[DT_HISTORICO] >= DTINI),
            FILTER(CTT_HISTPRD,CTT_HISTPRD[DT_HISTORICO] <= DTFIM)
        ),
       CALCULATE(SUM(CTT_HISTPRD[QT_CANA_VEGETAL]),
            FILTER(CTT_HISTPRD,CTT_HISTPRD[DT_HISTORICO] >= DTINI),
            FILTER(CTT_HISTPRD,CTT_HISTPRD[DT_HISTORICO] <= DTFIM)
        )
)
MedidaCTT_HISTPRD.Z_CTT_HISTPRD_KGVEGETAL_ANO_IDCOR

IF(CTT_META_REUNIAO[Z_CTT_META_R_VEGE_ANO]>=[Z_CTT_HISTPRD_KGVEGETAL_ANO],1,2)
MedidaCTT_HISTPRD.Z_CTT_HISTPRD_KGVEGETAL_MES

//VAR DTINI = DATE(2025,3,1)
VAR DTINI = EOMONTH(MAX(X_DATA[DT]),-1)+1
//VAR DTINI = MAX(X_DATA[DT]) + 0 - WEEKDAY(MAX(X_DATA[DT]),3)
VAR DTFIM = MAX(X_DATA[DT])
RETURN
DIVIDE(CALCULATE(SUM(CTT_HISTPRD[QT_IMPUR_VEG]),
            FILTER(CTT_HISTPRD,CTT_HISTPRD[DT_HISTORICO] >= DTINI),
            FILTER(CTT_HISTPRD,CTT_HISTPRD[DT_HISTORICO] <= DTFIM)
        ),
       CALCULATE(SUM(CTT_HISTPRD[QT_CANA_VEGETAL]),
            FILTER(CTT_HISTPRD,CTT_HISTPRD[DT_HISTORICO] >= DTINI),
            FILTER(CTT_HISTPRD,CTT_HISTPRD[DT_HISTORICO] <= DTFIM)
        )
)
MedidaCTT_HISTPRD.Z_CTT_HISTPRD_KGVEGETAL_MES_IDCOR

VAR DTINI = MAX(X_DATA[DT]) + 0 - WEEKDAY(MAX(X_DATA[DT]),3)
VAR DTFIM = MAX(X_DATA[DT])
RETURN
DIVIDE(CALCULATE(SUM(CTT_HISTPRD[QT_IMPUR_VEG]),
            FILTER(CTT_HISTPRD,CTT_HISTPRD[DT_HISTORICO] >= DTINI),
            FILTER(CTT_HISTPRD,CTT_HISTPRD[DT_HISTORICO] <= DTFIM)
        ),
       CALCULATE(SUM(CTT_HISTPRD[QT_CANA_VEGETAL]),
            FILTER(CTT_HISTPRD,CTT_HISTPRD[DT_HISTORICO] >= DTINI),
            FILTER(CTT_HISTPRD,CTT_HISTPRD[DT_HISTORICO] <= DTFIM)
        )
)
MedidaCTT_HISTPRD.Z_CTT_HISTPRD_KGVEGETAL_SEMANA_IDCOR

VAR DTINI = DATE(2025,3,1)
//VAR DTINI = EOMONTH(MAX(X_DATA[DT]),-1)+1
//VAR DTINI = MAX(X_DATA[DT]) + 0 - WEEKDAY(MAX(X_DATA[DT]),3)
VAR DTFIM = MAX(X_DATA[DT])
RETURN
IF(ISBLANK(
            CALCULATE(SUM(CTT_HISTPRD[QT_CANA_ENT]),
                        FILTER(ALL(CTT_HISTPRD), CTT_HISTPRD[DT_HISTORICO] >= DTINI),
                        FILTER(ALL(CTT_HISTPRD), CTT_HISTPRD[DT_HISTORICO] <= DTFIM),
                        FILTERS(FRENTRANSP[DE_FREN_TRAN])
                    )
            ), 0, 
            CALCULATE(SUM(CTT_HISTPRD[QT_CANA_ENT]),
                        FILTER(ALL(CTT_HISTPRD), CTT_HISTPRD[DT_HISTORICO] >= DTINI),
                        FILTER(ALL(CTT_HISTPRD), CTT_HISTPRD[DT_HISTORICO] <= DTFIM),
                        FILTERS(FRENTRANSP[DE_FREN_TRAN])
                    )
)

//VAR DTINI = DATE(2025,3,1)
VAR DTINI = EOMONTH(MAX(X_DATA[DT]),-1)+1
//VAR DTINI = MAX(X_DATA[DT]) + 0 - WEEKDAY(MAX(X_DATA[DT]),3)
VAR DTFIM = MAX(X_DATA[DT])
RETURN
DIVIDE(CALCULATE(SUM(CTT_HISTPRD[QT_IMPUR_TERRA]),
            FILTER(CTT_HISTPRD,CTT_HISTPRD[DT_HISTORICO] >= DTINI),
            FILTER(CTT_HISTPRD,CTT_HISTPRD[DT_HISTORICO] <= DTFIM),
            FILTER(CTT_HISTPRD,CTT_HISTPRD[CD_FREN_TRAN] = 1)
        ),
       CALCULATE(SUM(CTT_HISTPRD[QT_CANA_TERRA]),
            FILTER(CTT_HISTPRD,CTT_HISTPRD[DT_HISTORICO] >= DTINI),
            FILTER(CTT_HISTPRD,CTT_HISTPRD[DT_HISTORICO] <= DTFIM),
            FILTER(CTT_HISTPRD,CTT_HISTPRD[CD_FREN_TRAN] = 1)
        )
)

VAR DTINI = [DT_SAFRA_INI]
//VAR DTINI = EOMONTH(MAX(X_DATA[DT]),-1)+1
//VAR DTINI = MAX(X_DATA[DT]) + 0 - WEEKDAY(MAX(X_DATA[DT]),3)
VAR DTFIM = MAX(X_DATA[DT])
RETURN
IF(ISBLANK(
            DIVIDE(CALCULATE(SUM(CTT_INDISPONIB[HR_PARADA_META]),
                                FILTER(ALL(CTT_INDISPONIB), CTT_INDISPONIB[DATA_BASE] >= DTINI),
                                FILTER(ALL(CTT_INDISPONIB), CTT_INDISPONIB[DATA_BASE] <= DTFIM)
                            ),24)
            ),0,
            DIVIDE(CALCULATE(SUM(CTT_INDISPONIB[HR_PARADA_META]),
                            FILTER(ALL(CTT_INDISPONIB), CTT_INDISPONIB[DATA_BASE] >= DTINI),
                            FILTER(ALL(CTT_INDISPONIB), CTT_INDISPONIB[DATA_BASE] <= DTFIM)
                    ),24)
)

//VAR DTINI = [DT_SAFRA_INI]
//VAR DTINI = EOMONTH(MAX(X_DATA[DT]),-1)+1
VAR DTINI = IF(WEEKNUM(MAX(X_DATA[DT]))=11,[DT_SAFRA_INI],
                MAX(X_DATA[DT]) + 0 - WEEKDAY(MAX(X_DATA[DT]),3))
VAR DTFIM = MAX(X_DATA[DT])
RETURN
IF(ISBLANK(
            DIVIDE(CALCULATE(SUM(CTT_INDISPONIB[HR_PARADA_REAL]),
                                FILTER(ALL(CTT_INDISPONIB), CTT_INDISPONIB[DATA_BASE] >= DTINI),
                                FILTER(ALL(CTT_INDISPONIB), CTT_INDISPONIB[DATA_BASE] <= DTFIM)
                            ),24)
            ),0,
            DIVIDE(CALCULATE(SUM(CTT_INDISPONIB[HR_PARADA_REAL]),
                            FILTER(ALL(CTT_INDISPONIB), CTT_INDISPONIB[DATA_BASE] >= DTINI),
                            FILTER(ALL(CTT_INDISPONIB), CTT_INDISPONIB[DATA_BASE] <= DTFIM)
                    ),24)
)
MedidaCTT_INDISPONIB.Z_CTT_INDISP_DIAS_EETIVOS
0
MedidaCTT_INDISPONIB.Z_CTT_INDISP_IDCOR

IF(SUM(CTT_INDISPONIB[HR_PARADA_META])>SUM(CTT_INDISPONIB[HR_PARADA_REAL]),2,1)
MedidaCTT_INDISPONIB_CALC.Z_INDISP_CALC_AGRP_PARADA

SELECTEDVALUE(CTT_INDISPONIB_CALC[AGRP_PARADA])
MedidaCTT_INDISPONIB_CALC.Z_INDISP_CALC_DIAEFET

(FORMAT(MAX(CTT_DATA[DT]),"0.0") - FORMAT(MIN(CTT_DATA[DT]),"0.0") + 1) - 
(CALCULATE(SUM(CTT_INDISPONIB[HR_PARADA_REAL]),
            ALLSELECTED(CTT_INDISPONIB_CALC[AGRP_PARADA]))/24)
MedidaCTT_INDISPONIB_CALC.Z_INDISP_CALC_DIAEFET_IDCOR

VAR DIAEFET_META = SUM(CTT_META_REUNIAO[DIA_EFET_META])
RETURN
IF([Z_INDISP_CALC_DIAEFET]>DIAEFET_META,2,1)
MedidaCTT_INDISPONIB_CALC.Z_INDISP_CALC_VARMOAG_ANO

VAR DTINI = DATE(2025,3,4)
//VAR DTINI = EOMONTH(MAX(X_DATA[DT]),-1)+1
//VAR DTINI = MAX(X_DATA[DT]) + 0 - WEEKDAY(MAX(X_DATA[DT]),3)
VAR DTFIM = MAX(X_DATA[DT])

VAR TON_PARADAS =   (
                        (CALCULATE(SUM(CTT_INDISPONIB[HR_PARADA_META]),
                                FILTER(ALL(CTT_INDISPONIB),CTT_INDISPONIB[DATA_BASE] >= DTINI),
                                FILTER(ALL(CTT_INDISPONIB),CTT_INDISPONIB[DATA_BASE] <= DTFIM),
                                FILTERS(CTT_INDISPONIB_CALC[AGRP_PARADA])
                                )
                    -   CALCULATE(SUM(CTT_INDISPONIB[HR_PARADA_REAL]),
                                FILTER(ALL(CTT_INDISPONIB),CTT_INDISPONIB[DATA_BASE] >= DTINI),
                                FILTER(ALL(CTT_INDISPONIB),CTT_INDISPONIB[DATA_BASE] <= DTFIM),
                                FILTERS(CTT_INDISPONIB_CALC[AGRP_PARADA])
                                )
                        )
                    /24)*
                    [Z_CTT_META_PRDDIA_ANO]

VAR TON_ROTACAO =   ([Z_CTT_HISTPRD_PRDDIA_ANO] - [Z_CTT_META_PRDDIA_ANO]) * 
                    [Z_CTT_INDISP_DIASEFET_ANO]

RETURN
IF(LEFT([Z_INDISP_CALC_AGRP_PARADA],1)="M",TON_ROTACAO,TON_PARADAS)
MedidaCTT_INDISPONIB_CALC.Z_INDISP_CALC_VARMOAG_MES

//VAR DTINI = DATE(2025,3,1)
VAR DTINI = IF(MONTH(MAX(X_DATA[DT]))=3,DATE(2025,3,4),EOMONTH(MAX(X_DATA[DT]),-1)+1)
//VAR DTINI = MAX(X_DATA[DT]) + 0 - WEEKDAY(MAX(X_DATA[DT]),3)
VAR DTFIM = MAX(X_DATA[DT])

VAR TON_PARADAS =   (
                        (CALCULATE(SUM(CTT_INDISPONIB[HR_PARADA_META]),
                                FILTER(ALL(CTT_INDISPONIB),CTT_INDISPONIB[DATA_BASE] >= DTINI),
                                FILTER(ALL(CTT_INDISPONIB),CTT_INDISPONIB[DATA_BASE] <= DTFIM),
                                FILTERS(CTT_INDISPONIB_CALC[AGRP_PARADA])
                                )
                    -   CALCULATE(SUM(CTT_INDISPONIB[HR_PARADA_REAL]),
                                FILTER(ALL(CTT_INDISPONIB),CTT_INDISPONIB[DATA_BASE] >= DTINI),
                                FILTER(ALL(CTT_INDISPONIB),CTT_INDISPONIB[DATA_BASE] <= DTFIM),
                                FILTERS(CTT_INDISPONIB_CALC[AGRP_PARADA])
                                )
                        )
                    /24)*
                    [Z_CTT_META_PRDDIA_MES]

VAR TON_ROTACAO =   ([Z_CTT_HISTPRD_PRDDIA_MES] - [Z_CTT_META_PRDDIA_MES]) * 
                    [Z_CTT_INDISP_DIASEFET_MES]

RETURN
IF(LEFT([Z_INDISP_CALC_AGRP_PARADA],1)="M",TON_ROTACAO,TON_PARADAS)
MedidaCTT_INDISPONIB_CALC.Z_INDISP_CALC_VARMOAG_SEMANA

//VAR DTINI = DATE(2025,3,1)
//VAR DTINI = EOMONTH(MAX(X_DATA[DT]),-1)+1
VAR DTINI = IF(WEEKNUM(MAX(X_DATA[DT]))=11, DATE(2025,3,4),
                MAX(X_DATA[DT]) + 0 - WEEKDAY(MAX(X_DATA[DT]),3))
VAR DTFIM = MAX(X_DATA[DT])

VAR TON_PARADAS =   (
                        (CALCULATE(SUM(CTT_INDISPONIB[HR_PARADA_META]),
                                FILTER(ALL(CTT_INDISPONIB),CTT_INDISPONIB[DATA_BASE] >= DTINI),
                                FILTER(ALL(CTT_INDISPONIB),CTT_INDISPONIB[DATA_BASE] <= DTFIM),
                                FILTERS(CTT_INDISPONIB_CALC[AGRP_PARADA])
                                )
                    -   CALCULATE(SUM(CTT_INDISPONIB[HR_PARADA_REAL]),
                                FILTER(ALL(CTT_INDISPONIB),CTT_INDISPONIB[DATA_BASE] >= DTINI),
                                FILTER(ALL(CTT_INDISPONIB),CTT_INDISPONIB[DATA_BASE] <= DTFIM),
                                FILTERS(CTT_INDISPONIB_CALC[AGRP_PARADA])
                                )
                        )
                    /24)*
                    [Z_CTT_META_PRDDIA_SEMANA]

VAR TON_ROTACAO =   ([Z_CTT_HISTPRD_PRDDIA_SEMANA] - [Z_CTT_META_PRDDIA_SEMANA]) * 
                    [Z_CTT_INDISP_DIASEFET_SEMANA]

RETURN
IF(LEFT([Z_INDISP_CALC_AGRP_PARADA],1)="M",TON_ROTACAO,TON_PARADAS)
MedidaCTT_MATURADOR.Z_CTT_MATURA_DIASMED

    AVERAGE(CTT_MATURADOR[DIAS_APLICxMOAGEM])
MedidaCTT_MATURADOR.Z_CTT_MATURA_DIAS_IDCOR

IF([Z_CTT_MATURA_DIASMED]=0,1,
IF([Z_CTT_MATURA_DIASMED]>AVERAGE(CTT_MATURADOR[DD_MAX_MAT]),1
,0
))
MedidaCTT_MATURADOR.Z_CTT_MATURA_PERIODO_ANO_ABAIXO

VAR DTINI = DATE(2025,1,1)
//VAR DTINI = EOMONTH(MAX(X_DATA[DT]),-1)+1
//VAR DTINI = MAX(X_DATA[DT]) + 0 - WEEKDAY(MAX(X_DATA[DT]),3)
VAR DTFIM = MAX(X_DATA[DT])
RETURN
CALCULATE(SUM(CTT_MATURADOR[TON_ABAIXO]),
            FILTER(CTT_MATURADOR, CTT_MATURADOR[STATUS] <> "À COLHER"),
            FILTER(CTT_MATURADOR, CTT_MATURADOR[DT_MOAGEM] >= DTINI),
            FILTER(CTT_MATURADOR, CTT_MATURADOR[DT_MOAGEM] <= DTFIM)
)
MedidaCTT_MATURADOR.Z_CTT_MATURA_PERIODO_ANO_ACIMA

            FILTER(CTT_MATURADOR, CTT_MATURADOR[STATUS] <> "À COLHER"),
            FILTER(CTT_MATURADOR, CTT_MATURADOR[DT_MOAGEM] >= DTINI),

//VAR DTINI = DATE(2025,1,1)
//VAR DTINI = EOMONTH(MAX(X_DATA[DT]),-1)+1
VAR DTINI = MAX(X_DATA[DT]) + 0 - WEEKDAY(MAX(X_DATA[DT]),3)
VAR DTFIM = MAX(X_DATA[DT])

            FILTER(CTT_MATURADOR, CTT_MATURADOR[STATUS] <> "À COLHER"),
            FILTER(CTT_MATURADOR, CTT_MATURADOR[DT_MOAGEM] >= DTINI),
            FILTER(CTT_MATURADOR, CTT_MATURADOR[DT_MOAGEM] <= DTFIM)
)

//VAR DTINI = DATE(2025,1,1)
//VAR DTINI = EOMONTH(MAX(X_DATA[DT]),-1)+1
VAR DTINI = MAX(X_DATA[DT]) + 0 - WEEKDAY(MAX(X_DATA[DT]),3)
VAR DTFIM = MAX(X_DATA[DT])
RETURN
CALCULATE(SUM(CTT_MATURADOR[TON_FRENTE10]),
            FILTER(CTT_MATURADOR, CTT_MATURADOR[STATUS] <> "À COLHER"),
            FILTER(CTT_MATURADOR, CTT_MATURADOR[DT_MOAGEM] >= DTINI),
            FILTER(CTT_MATURADOR, CTT_MATURADOR[DT_MOAGEM] <= DTFIM)
)
MedidaCTT_MATURADOR.Z_CTT_MATURA_PERIODO_SEMANA_SEM_MATURADOR

//VAR DTINI = DATE(2025,1,1)
//VAR DTINI = EOMONTH(MAX(X_DATA[DT]),-1)+1
VAR DTINI = MAX(X_DATA[DT]) + 0 - WEEKDAY(MAX(X_DATA[DT]),3)
VAR DTFIM = MAX(X_DATA[DT])
RETURN
CALCULATE(SUM(CTT_MATURADOR[TON_SEM_MATURADOR]),
            FILTER(CTT_MATURADOR, CTT_MATURADOR[STATUS] <> "À COLHER"),
            FILTER(CTT_MATURADOR, CTT_MATURADOR[DT_MOAGEM] >= DTINI),
            FILTER(CTT_MATURADOR, CTT_MATURADOR[DT_MOAGEM] <= DTFIM)
)
MedidaCTT_MATURADOR.Z_CTT_MATURA_PREATR

IF(ISBLANK(SUM([TON_TOTAL])),0,
    DIVIDE(SUM([TON_PREATR_KG]),SUM([TON_PREATR]))
)
MedidaCTT_MATURADOR.Z_CTT_MATURA_PREATR_ULTAMOST

FORMAT(AVERAGE([ULT_AMOSTRA]),"DD/MM/YYYY")
MedidaCTT_META_MOAGEM.Z_CTT_META_ATR_TOTAL

IF(ISBLANK(CALCULATE(SUM(CTT_META_MOAGEM[TON_KG_ATR]),CTT_META_MOAGEM[DT]<=MAX(CTT_DATA[DT]))),0,
    
        DIVIDE(
            CALCULATE(SUM(CTT_META_MOAGEM[TON_KG_ATR]),CTT_META_MOAGEM[DT]<=MAX(CTT_DATA[DT])),
            CALCULATE(SUM(CTT_META_MOAGEM[TON_EFET]),CTT_META_MOAGEM[DT]<=MAX(CTT_DATA[DT])))

)
MedidaCTT_META_MOAGEM.Z_CTT_META_HR

IF(VALUE(FORMAT(NOW(),"NN")) < 30,
    IF(VALUE(FORMAT(NOW(),"HH"))=0,17,
    IF(VALUE(FORMAT(NOW(),"HH"))>=7,VALUE(FORMAT(NOW(),"HH"))-7,
    17+VALUE(FORMAT(NOW(),"HH"))))
    ,
    IF(VALUE(FORMAT(NOW(),"HH"))=0,18,
    IF(VALUE(FORMAT(NOW(),"HH"))>=7,VALUE(FORMAT(NOW(),"HH"))-6,
    18+VALUE(FORMAT(NOW(),"HH"))))
)
MedidaCTT_META_MOAGEM.Z_CTT_META_HRINDISP

((MAX(CTT_DATA[DT])-MIN(CTT_DATA[DT])+1)*24)
-SUM(CTT_META_MOAGEM[HR_MOAGEM_EFET])
MedidaCTT_META_MOAGEM.Z_CTT_META_MINE_TOTAL

IF(ISBLANK(CALCULATE(SUM(CTT_META_MOAGEM[TON_KG_TERR]),CTT_META_MOAGEM[DT]<=MAX(CTT_DATA_FLT[DT]))),0,
        DIVIDE(
            CALCULATE(SUM(CTT_META_MOAGEM[TON_KG_TERR]),CTT_META_MOAGEM[DT]<=MAX(CTT_DATA_FLT[DT])),
            CALCULATE(SUM(CTT_META_MOAGEM[TON_EFET]),CTT_META_MOAGEM[DT]<=MAX(CTT_DATA_FLT[DT]))
            )
)
MedidaCTT_META_MOAGEM.Z_CTT_META_PERDA

DIVIDE(SUM(CTT_META_MOAGEM[TON_PERDA]),SUM(CTT_META_MOAGEM[TON_EFET]))
MedidaCTT_META_MOAGEM.Z_CTT_META_TONHR

IF(ISBLANK(CALCULATE(SUM(CTT_META_MOAGEM[TON]),
                FILTER(CTT_META_MOAGEM,CTT_META_MOAGEM[DT]<=MIN(CTT_DATA[DT])))),0,

    IF(VALUE(LEFT(SELECTEDVALUE(CTT_CARGAS_ENTRADA_VISAO_PARAM[VISAO]),1))=1,
        CALCULATE(SUM(CTT_META_MOAGEM[TON]),
            CTT_META_MOAGEM[DT]<=MIN(CTT_DATA[DT]),
            FILTER(CTT_DTHRFREN,CTT_DTHRFREN[ORD_HR] <= SELECTEDVALUE(CTT_CARGAS_ENTRADA_VISAO_PARAM[HR]))
            )
        *CALCULATE(SUM(CTT_DTHRFREN[QT_FATOR]),
            CTT_DTHRFREN[DT]<=MIN(CTT_DATA[DT]),
            FILTER(CTT_DTHRFREN,CTT_DTHRFREN[ORD_HR] <= SELECTEDVALUE(CTT_CARGAS_ENTRADA_VISAO_PARAM[HR]))
            )
        ,
        CALCULATE(SUM(CTT_META_MOAGEM[TON]),
            CTT_META_MOAGEM[DT]<=MIN(CTT_DATA[DT])
            )
        *CALCULATE(SUM(CTT_DTHRFREN[QT_FATOR]),
            CTT_DTHRFREN[DT]<=MIN(CTT_DATA[DT])
            )
    )
)
MedidaCTT_META_MOAGEM.Z_CTT_META_TONHRMXGRF_F01

    CALCULATE(
        IF([Z_CTT_META_TON_F01]>=[Z_CTT_ENTRADA_TONHR_F01],
            [Z_CTT_META_TON_F01],[Z_CTT_ENTRADA_TONHR_F01]) * 1.4,
        ALLCROSSFILTERED(FRENTRANSP)
    )
MedidaCTT_META_MOAGEM.Z_CTT_META_TONHRMXGRF_F02

    CALCULATE(
        IF([Z_CTT_META_TON_F02]>=[Z_CTT_ENTRADA_TONHR_F02],
            [Z_CTT_META_TON_F02],[Z_CTT_ENTRADA_TONHR_F02]) * 1.4,
        ALLCROSSFILTERED(FRENTRANSP)
    )
MedidaCTT_META_MOAGEM.Z_CTT_META_TONHRMXGRF_F03

    CALCULATE(
        IF([Z_CTT_META_TON_F03]>=[Z_CTT_ENTRADA_TONHR_F03],
            [Z_CTT_META_TON_F03],[Z_CTT_ENTRADA_TONHR_F03]) * 1.4,
        ALLCROSSFILTERED(FRENTRANSP)
    )
MedidaCTT_META_MOAGEM.Z_CTT_META_TONHRMXGRF_F04

    CALCULATE(
        IF([Z_CTT_META_TON_F04]>=[Z_CTT_ENTRADA_TONHR_F04],
            [Z_CTT_META_TON_F04],[Z_CTT_ENTRADA_TONHR_F04]) * 1.4,
        ALLCROSSFILTERED(FRENTRANSP)
    )
MedidaCTT_META_MOAGEM.Z_CTT_META_TONHRMXGRF_F05

    CALCULATE(
        IF([Z_CTT_META_TON_F05]>=[Z_CTT_ENTRADA_TONHR_F05],
            [Z_CTT_META_TON_F05],[Z_CTT_ENTRADA_TONHR_F05]) * 1.4,
        ALLCROSSFILTERED(FRENTRANSP)
    )
MedidaCTT_META_MOAGEM.Z_CTT_META_TONHRMXGRF_F10

    CALCULATE(
        IF([Z_CTT_META_TON_F10]>=[Z_CTT_ENTRADA_TONHR_F10],
            [Z_CTT_META_TON_F10],[Z_CTT_ENTRADA_TONHR_F10]) * 1.4,
        ALLCROSSFILTERED(FRENTRANSP)
    )
MedidaCTT_META_MOAGEM.Z_CTT_META_TONHRMXGRF_F27

    CALCULATE(
        IF([Z_CTT_META_TON_F10]>=[Z_CTT_ENTRADA_TONHR_F27],
            [Z_CTT_META_TON_F10],[Z_CTT_ENTRADA_TONHR_F27]) * 1.4,
        ALLCROSSFILTERED(FRENTRANSP)
    )
MedidaCTT_META_MOAGEM.Z_CTT_META_TONHRMXGRF_FTOTAL

    CALCULATE(
        IF([Z_CTT_META_TON_FTOTAL]>=[Z_CTT_ENTRADA_TONHR_FTOTAL],
            [Z_CTT_META_TON_FTOTAL],[Z_CTT_ENTRADA_TONHR_FTOTAL]) * 1.4,
        ALLCROSSFILTERED(FRENTRANSP)
    )
MedidaCTT_META_MOAGEM.Z_CTT_META_TONHR_2

IF(ISBLANK(CALCULATE(SUM(CTT_META_MOAGEM[TON]),
                FILTER(CTT_META_MOAGEM,CTT_META_MOAGEM[DT]<=MIN(CTT_DATA[DT])))),0,

    IF(VALUE(LEFT(SELECTEDVALUE(CTT_CARGAS_ENTRADA_VISAO_PARAM[VISAO]),1))=1,
        CALCULATE(SUM(CTT_META_MOAGEM[TON]),
            CTT_META_MOAGEM[DT]<=MIN(CTT_DATA[DT]),
            FILTER(CTT_DTHRFREN,CTT_DTHRFREN[ORD_HR] <= SELECTEDVALUE(CTT_CARGAS_ENTRADA_VISAO_PARAM[HR]))
            )
        *CALCULATE(SUM(CTT_DTHRFREN[QT_FATOR]),
            CTT_DTHRFREN[DT]<=MIN(CTT_DATA[DT]),
            FILTER(CTT_DTHRFREN,CTT_DTHRFREN[ORD_HR] <= SELECTEDVALUE(CTT_CARGAS_ENTRADA_VISAO_PARAM[HR]))
            )
        ,
        CALCULATE(SUM(CTT_META_MOAGEM[TON]),
            CTT_META_MOAGEM[DT]<=MIN(CTT_DATA[DT])
            )
        *CALCULATE(SUM(CTT_DTHRFREN[QT_FATOR]),
            CTT_DTHRFREN[DT]<=MIN(CTT_DATA[DT])
            )
    )
)/COUNT(CTT_META_MOAGEM[CD_FREN_TRAN])
MedidaCTT_META_MOAGEM.Z_CTT_META_TONHR_F01

IF(ISBLANK(CALCULATE(SUM(CTT_META_MOAGEM[TON]),ALL(FRENTRANSP[DE_FREN_TRAN]))),0,

    IF(VALUE(LEFT(SELECTEDVALUE(CTT_CARGAS_ENTRADA_VISAO_PARAM[VISAO]),1))=1,
        DIVIDE(
            CALCULATE(SUM(CTT_META_MOAGEM[TON]),
                CTT_META_MOAGEM[DT]<=MIN(CTT_DATA[DT]),
                CTT_META_MOAGEM[CD_FREN_TRAN]=1,
                ALLCROSSFILTERED(FRENTRANSP)
                ),24)
        *SELECTEDVALUE(CTT_CARGAS_ENTRADA_VISAO_PARAM[HR])
        ,
        CALCULATE(SUM(CTT_META_MOAGEM[TON]),
            CTT_META_MOAGEM[DT]<=MIN(CTT_DATA[DT]),
            CTT_META_MOAGEM[CD_FREN_TRAN]=1,

    )
)

        DIVIDE(
            CALCULATE(SUM(CTT_META_MOAGEM[TON_KG_VEG]),CTT_META_MOAGEM[DT]<=MAX(CTT_DATA_FLT[DT])),
            CALCULATE(SUM(CTT_META_MOAGEM[TON_EFET]),CTT_META_MOAGEM[DT]<=MAX(CTT_DATA_FLT[DT])))

)
MedidaCTT_META_REUNIAO.Z_CTT_META_ATR_ANO

VAR DTINI = DATE(2025,3,1)
//VAR DTINI = EOMONTH(MAX(X_DATA[DT]),-1)+1
//VAR DTINI = MAX(X_DATA[DT]) + 0 - WEEKDAY(MAX(X_DATA[DT]),3)
VAR DTFIM = MAX(X_DATA[DT])
RETURN
IF(ISBLANK(
            CALCULATE(SUM(CTT_META_REUNIAO[TON_KG_ATR]),
                        FILTER(ALL(CTT_META_REUNIAO), CTT_META_REUNIAO[DT] >= DTINI),
                        FILTER(ALL(CTT_META_REUNIAO), CTT_META_REUNIAO[DT] >= DTFIM)
                    )
            ), 0, 
            DIVIDE(
                CALCULATE(SUM(CTT_META_REUNIAO[TON_KG_ATR]),
                            FILTER(ALL(CTT_META_REUNIAO), CTT_META_REUNIAO[DT] >= DTINI),
                            FILTER(ALL(CTT_META_REUNIAO), CTT_META_REUNIAO[DT] <= DTFIM)
                        ),
                CALCULATE(SUM(CTT_META_REUNIAO[TON_EFET]),
                            FILTER(ALL(CTT_META_REUNIAO), CTT_META_REUNIAO[DT] >= DTINI),
                            FILTER(ALL(CTT_META_REUNIAO), CTT_META_REUNIAO[DT] <= DTFIM)
                        )
                    )
)
MedidaCTT_META_REUNIAO.Z_CTT_META_ATR_ANO_ADICIONAL

VAR DTINI = DATE(2025,3,1)
//VAR DTINI = EOMONTH(MAX(X_DATA[DT]),-1)+1
//VAR DTINI = MAX(X_DATA[DT]) + 0 - WEEKDAY(MAX(X_DATA[DT]),3)

                        FILTER(ALL(CTT_META_REUNIAO), CTT_META_REUNIAO[DT] >= DTINI),
                        FILTER(ALL(CTT_META_REUNIAO), CTT_META_REUNIAO[DT] >= DTFIM)
                    )
            ), 0,

                        )
                    )
) * [Z_CTT_META_PRD_ADICIONAL]

                CALCULATE(SUM(CTT_META_REUNIAO[TON_EFET]),
                            FILTER(ALL(CTT_META_REUNIAO), CTT_META_REUNIAO[DT] >= DTINI),
                            FILTER(ALL(CTT_META_REUNIAO), CTT_META_REUNIAO[DT] <= DTFIM)
                        )
                    )
) * [Z_CTT_META_PRD_ADICIONAL]
MedidaCTT_META_REUNIAO.Z_CTT_META_DIASEFET_ANO

VAR DTINI = DATE(2025,3,4)
//VAR DTINI = EOMONTH(MAX(X_DATA[DT]),-1)+1
//VAR DTINI = MAX(X_DATA[DT]) + 0 - WEEKDAY(MAX(X_DATA[DT]),3)
VAR DTFIM = MAX(X_DATA[DT])
RETURN
IF(ISBLANK(
            CALCULATE(SUM(CTT_META_REUNIAO[DIA_EFET_META]),
                        FILTER(ALL(CTT_META_REUNIAO), CTT_META_REUNIAO[DT] >= DTINI),
                        FILTER(ALL(CTT_META_REUNIAO), CTT_META_REUNIAO[DT] >= DTFIM)
                    )
            ), 0, 
            CALCULATE(SUM(CTT_META_REUNIAO[DIA_EFET_META]),
                        FILTER(ALL(CTT_META_REUNIAO), CTT_META_REUNIAO[DT] >= DTINI),
                        FILTER(ALL(CTT_META_REUNIAO), CTT_META_REUNIAO[DT] <= DTFIM)
                    )
)

VAR DTINI = DATE(2025,3,1)
//VAR DTINI = EOMONTH(MAX(X_DATA[DT]),-1)+1
//VAR DTINI = MAX(X_DATA[DT]) + 0 - WEEKDAY(MAX(X_DATA[DT]),3)
VAR DTFIM = MAX(X_DATA[DT])
RETURN
IF(ISBLANK(
            CALCULATE(SUM(CTT_META_REUNIAO[TON_EFET]),
                        FILTER(ALL(CTT_META_REUNIAO), CTT_META_REUNIAO[DT] >= DTINI),
                        FILTER(ALL(CTT_META_REUNIAO), CTT_META_REUNIAO[DT] <= DTFIM),
                        FILTERS(FRENTRANSP[DE_FREN_TRAN])
                    )
            ), 0, 
            CALCULATE(SUM(CTT_META_REUNIAO[TON_EFET]),
                        FILTER(ALL(CTT_META_REUNIAO), CTT_META_REUNIAO[DT] >= DTINI),
                        FILTER(ALL(CTT_META_REUNIAO), CTT_META_REUNIAO[DT] <= DTFIM),
                        FILTERS(FRENTRANSP[DE_FREN_TRAN])
                    )
)
MedidaCTT_META_REUNIAO.Z_CTT_META_PRD_ANO_ADICIONAL

            CALCULATE(SUM(CTT_META_REUNIAO[TON_EFET]),
                        FILTER(ALL(CTT_META_REUNIAO), CTT_META_REUNIAO[DT] >= DTINI),
                        FILTER(ALL(CTT_META_REUNIAO), CTT_META_REUNIAO[DT] <= DTFIM)
                    )
            ), 0,

                        FILTER(ALL(CTT_META_REUNIAO), CTT_META_REUNIAO[DT] >= DTINI),

VAR DTINI = DATE(2025,3,1)
//VAR DTINI = EOMONTH(MAX(X_DATA[DT]),-1)+1

            CALCULATE(SUM(CTT_META_REUNIAO[TON_EFET]),
                        FILTER(ALL(CTT_META_REUNIAO), CTT_META_REUNIAO[DT] >= DTINI),
                        FILTER(ALL(CTT_META_REUNIAO), CTT_META_REUNIAO[DT] <= DTFIM),
                        FILTER(ALL(CTT_META_REUNIAO), CTT_META_REUNIAO[CD_FREN_TRAN] >= 10)
                    )
            ), 0, 
            CALCULATE(SUM(CTT_META_REUNIAO[TON_EFET]),
                        FILTER(ALL(CTT_META_REUNIAO), CTT_META_REUNIAO[DT] >= DTINI),
                        FILTER(ALL(CTT_META_REUNIAO), CTT_META_REUNIAO[DT] <= DTFIM),
                        FILTER(ALL(CTT_META_REUNIAO), CTT_META_REUNIAO[CD_FREN_TRAN] >= 10)
                    )
) * [Z_CTT_META_PRD_ADICIONAL]

                        FILTER(ALL(CTT_META_REUNIAO), CTT_META_REUNIAO[DT] >= DTINI),
                        FILTER(ALL(CTT_META_REUNIAO), CTT_META_REUNIAO[DT] <= DTFIM),
                        FILTER(ALL(CTT_META_REUNIAO), CTT_META_REUNIAO[CD_FREN_TRAN] <= 5)
                    )
            ), 0,

                        FILTER(ALL(CTT_META_REUNIAO), CTT_META_REUNIAO[DT] >= DTINI),

                        FILTER(ALL(CTT_META_REUNIAO), CTT_META_REUNIAO[DT] >= DTINI),
                        FILTER(ALL(CTT_META_REUNIAO), CTT_META_REUNIAO[DT] <= DTFIM),
                        FILTER(ALL(CTT_META_REUNIAO), CTT_META_REUNIAO[CD_FREN_TRAN] >= 10)
                    )
            ), 0, 
            CALCULATE(SUM(CTT_META_REUNIAO[TON_EFET]),
                        FILTER(ALL(CTT_META_REUNIAO), CTT_META_REUNIAO[DT] >= DTINI),
                        FILTER(ALL(CTT_META_REUNIAO), CTT_META_REUNIAO[DT] <= DTFIM),
                        FILTER(ALL(CTT_META_REUNIAO), CTT_META_REUNIAO[CD_FREN_TRAN] >= 10)
                    )
)
MedidaCTT_META_REUNIAO.Z_CTT_META_PRD_ANO_PROPRIO

//VAR DTINI = EOMONTH(MAX(X_DATA[DT]),-1)+1
//VAR DTINI = MAX(X_DATA[DT]) + 0 - WEEKDAY(MAX(X_DATA[DT]),3)

RETURN

        CALCULATE(SUM(CTT_META_REUNIAO[TON_KG_ATR]),
                    FILTER(CTT_META_REUNIAO, CTT_META_REUNIAO[DT] >= DTINI),
                    FILTER(CTT_META_REUNIAO, CTT_META_REUNIAO[DT] <= DTFIM)
                ),
        CALCULATE(SUM(CTT_META_REUNIAO[TON_EFET]),
                    FILTER(CTT_META_REUNIAO, CTT_META_REUNIAO[DT] >= DTINI),
                    FILTER(CTT_META_REUNIAO, CTT_META_REUNIAO[DT] <= DTFIM)
                )
)

//VAR DTINI = DATE(2025,3,1)
//VAR DTINI = EOMONTH(MAX(X_DATA[DT]),-1)+1

VAR DTFIM = MAX(X_DATA[DT])
RETURN
DIVIDE(
        CALCULATE(SUM(CTT_META_REUNIAO[TON_KG_ATR]),
                    FILTER(CTT_META_REUNIAO, CTT_META_REUNIAO[DT] >= DTINI),
                    FILTER(CTT_META_REUNIAO, CTT_META_REUNIAO[DT] <= DTFIM)
                ),

                    FILTER(CTT_META_REUNIAO, CTT_META_REUNIAO[DT] <= DTFIM)
                )
)
MedidaCTT_META_REUNIAO.Z_CTT_META_R_ATR_TOTAL

IF(ISBLANK(CALCULATE(SUM(CTT_META_REUNIAO[TON_KG_ATR]),CTT_META_REUNIAO[DT]<=MAX(CTT_DATA[DT]))),0,
    
        DIVIDE(
            CALCULATE(SUM(CTT_META_REUNIAO[TON_KG_ATR]),CTT_META_REUNIAO[DT]<=MAX(CTT_DATA[DT])),
            CALCULATE(SUM(CTT_META_REUNIAO[TON_EFET]),CTT_META_REUNIAO[DT]<=MAX(CTT_DATA[DT])))

)
MedidaCTT_META_REUNIAO.Z_CTT_META_R_MINE_ANO

VAR DTINI = [DT_SAFRA_INI]
//VAR DTINI = EOMONTH(MAX(X_DATA[DT]),-1)+1

    CALCULATE(SUM(CTT_META_REUNIAO[TON_KG_TERR]),
                FILTER(CTT_META_REUNIAO, CTT_META_REUNIAO[DT] >= DTINI),
                FILTER(CTT_META_REUNIAO, CTT_META_REUNIAO[DT] <= DTFIM)
            ),
    CALCULATE(SUM(CTT_META_REUNIAO[TON_EFET]),
                FILTER(CTT_META_REUNIAO, CTT_META_REUNIAO[DT] >= DTINI),
                FILTER(CTT_META_REUNIAO, CTT_META_REUNIAO[DT] <= DTFIM)

    )

RETURN

    CALCULATE(SUM(CTT_META_REUNIAO[TON_KG_TERR]),
                FILTER(CTT_META_REUNIAO, CTT_META_REUNIAO[DT] >= DTINI),
                FILTER(CTT_META_REUNIAO, CTT_META_REUNIAO[DT] <= DTFIM)
            ),
    CALCULATE(SUM(CTT_META_REUNIAO[TON_EFET]),
                FILTER(CTT_META_REUNIAO, CTT_META_REUNIAO[DT] >= DTINI),

    )

IF(ISBLANK(CALCULATE(SUM(CTT_META_REUNIAO[TON_KG_TERR]),CTT_META_REUNIAO[DT]<=MAX(CTT_DATA[DT]))),0,
        DIVIDE(
            CALCULATE(SUM(CTT_META_REUNIAO[TON_KG_TERR]),CTT_META_REUNIAO[DT]<=MAX(CTT_DATA[DT])),
            CALCULATE(SUM(CTT_META_REUNIAO[TON_EFET]),CTT_META_REUNIAO[DT]<=MAX(CTT_DATA[DT]))
            )
)
MedidaCTT_META_REUNIAO.Z_CTT_META_R_PERDA

DIVIDE(SUM(CTT_META_REUNIAO[TON_PERDA]),SUM(CTT_META_REUNIAO[TON_EFET]))
MedidaCTT_META_REUNIAO.Z_CTT_META_R_PERDA_ANO

VAR DTINI = [DT_SAFRA_INI]
//VAR DTINI = EOMONTH(MAX(X_DATA[DT]),-1)+1
//VAR DTINI = MAX(X_DATA[DT]) + 0 - WEEKDAY(MAX(X_DATA[DT]),3)
VAR DTFIM = MAX(X_DATA[DT])
RETURN
DIVIDE(
    CALCULATE(SUM(CTT_META_REUNIAO[TON_PERDA]),
                FILTER(CTT_META_REUNIAO, CTT_META_REUNIAO[DT] >= DTINI),
                FILTER(CTT_META_REUNIAO, CTT_META_REUNIAO[DT] <= DTFIM)
            ),
    CALCULATE(SUM(CTT_META_REUNIAO[TON_EFET]),
                FILTER(CTT_META_REUNIAO, CTT_META_REUNIAO[DT] >= DTINI),
                FILTER(CTT_META_REUNIAO, CTT_META_REUNIAO[DT] <= DTFIM)
            )
    )
MedidaCTT_META_REUNIAO.Z_CTT_META_R_PERDA_MES

//VAR DTINI = [DT_SAFRA_INI]
VAR DTINI = EOMONTH(MAX(X_DATA[DT]),-1)+1
//VAR DTINI = MAX(X_DATA[DT]) + 0 - WEEKDAY(MAX(X_DATA[DT]),3)
VAR DTFIM = MAX(X_DATA[DT])
RETURN
DIVIDE(
    CALCULATE(SUM(CTT_META_REUNIAO[TON_PERDA]),
                FILTER(CTT_META_REUNIAO, CTT_META_REUNIAO[DT] >= DTINI),
                FILTER(CTT_META_REUNIAO, CTT_META_REUNIAO[DT] <= DTFIM)
            ),
    CALCULATE(SUM(CTT_META_REUNIAO[TON_EFET]),
                FILTER(CTT_META_REUNIAO, CTT_META_REUNIAO[DT] >= DTINI),
                FILTER(CTT_META_REUNIAO, CTT_META_REUNIAO[DT] <= DTFIM)
            )
    )
MedidaCTT_META_REUNIAO.Z_CTT_META_R_PERDA_SEMANA

//VAR DTINI = [DT_SAFRA_INI]
//VAR DTINI = EOMONTH(MAX(X_DATA[DT]),-1)+1
VAR DTINI = MAX(X_DATA[DT]) + 0 - WEEKDAY(MAX(X_DATA[DT]),3)
VAR DTFIM = MAX(X_DATA[DT])
RETURN
DIVIDE(
    CALCULATE(SUM(CTT_META_REUNIAO[TON_PERDA]),
                FILTER(CTT_META_REUNIAO, CTT_META_REUNIAO[DT] >= DTINI),
                FILTER(CTT_META_REUNIAO, CTT_META_REUNIAO[DT] <= DTFIM)
            ),
    CALCULATE(SUM(CTT_META_REUNIAO[TON_EFET]),
                FILTER(CTT_META_REUNIAO, CTT_META_REUNIAO[DT] >= DTINI),
                FILTER(CTT_META_REUNIAO, CTT_META_REUNIAO[DT] <= DTFIM)
            )
    )
MedidaCTT_META_REUNIAO.Z_CTT_META_R_TON_EFET
SUM(CTT_META_REUNIAO[TON_EFET])
MedidaCTT_META_REUNIAO.Z_CTT_META_R_VARMOAGEM

SUM(CTT_HISTPRD[QT_CANA_ENT]) - [Z_CTT_META_R_TON_EFET]
MedidaCTT_META_REUNIAO.Z_CTT_META_R_VEGE_ANO

VAR DTINI = DATE(2025,3,1)
//VAR DTINI = EOMONTH(MAX(X_DATA[DT]),-1)+1
//VAR DTINI = MAX(X_DATA[DT]) + 0 - WEEKDAY(MAX(X_DATA[DT]),3)
VAR DTFIM = MAX(X_DATA[DT])
RETURN
DIVIDE(
    CALCULATE(SUM(CTT_META_REUNIAO[TON_KG_VEG]),
                FILTER(CTT_META_REUNIAO, CTT_META_REUNIAO[DT] >= DTINI),
                FILTER(CTT_META_REUNIAO, CTT_META_REUNIAO[DT] <= DTFIM)
            ),
    CALCULATE(SUM(CTT_META_REUNIAO[TON_EFET]),
                FILTER(CTT_META_REUNIAO, CTT_META_REUNIAO[DT] >= DTINI),
                FILTER(CTT_META_REUNIAO, CTT_META_REUNIAO[DT] <= DTFIM)
            )
    )
MedidaCTT_META_REUNIAO.Z_CTT_META_R_VEGE_MES

//VAR DTINI = DATE(2025,3,1)
VAR DTINI = EOMONTH(MAX(X_DATA[DT]),-1)+1
//VAR DTINI = MAX(X_DATA[DT]) + 0 - WEEKDAY(MAX(X_DATA[DT]),3)
VAR DTFIM = MAX(X_DATA[DT])
RETURN
DIVIDE(
    CALCULATE(SUM(CTT_META_REUNIAO[TON_KG_VEG]),
                FILTER(CTT_META_REUNIAO, CTT_META_REUNIAO[DT] >= DTINI),
                FILTER(CTT_META_REUNIAO, CTT_META_REUNIAO[DT] <= DTFIM)
            ),
    CALCULATE(SUM(CTT_META_REUNIAO[TON_EFET]),
                FILTER(CTT_META_REUNIAO, CTT_META_REUNIAO[DT] >= DTINI),
                FILTER(CTT_META_REUNIAO, CTT_META_REUNIAO[DT] <= DTFIM)
            )
    )
MedidaCTT_META_REUNIAO.Z_CTT_META_R_VEGE_SEMANA

//VAR DTINI = DATE(2025,3,1)
//VAR DTINI = EOMONTH(MAX(X_DATA[DT]),-1)+1
VAR DTINI = MAX(X_DATA[DT]) + 0 - WEEKDAY(MAX(X_DATA[DT]),3)
VAR DTFIM = MAX(X_DATA[DT])
RETURN
DIVIDE(
    CALCULATE(SUM(CTT_META_REUNIAO[TON_KG_VEG]),
                FILTER(CTT_META_REUNIAO, CTT_META_REUNIAO[DT] >= DTINI),
                FILTER(CTT_META_REUNIAO, CTT_META_REUNIAO[DT] <= DTFIM)
            ),
    CALCULATE(SUM(CTT_META_REUNIAO[TON_EFET]),
                FILTER(CTT_META_REUNIAO, CTT_META_REUNIAO[DT] >= DTINI),
                FILTER(CTT_META_REUNIAO, CTT_META_REUNIAO[DT] <= DTFIM)
            )
    )
MedidaCTT_META_REUNIAO.Z_CTT_META_R_VEGE_TOTAL

IF(ISBLANK(CALCULATE(SUM(CTT_META_REUNIAO[TON_KG_VEG]),CTT_META_REUNIAO[DT]<=MAX(CTT_DATA[DT]))),0,
        DIVIDE(
            CALCULATE(SUM(CTT_META_REUNIAO[TON_KG_VEG]),CTT_META_REUNIAO[DT]<=MAX(CTT_DATA[DT])),
            CALCULATE(SUM(CTT_META_REUNIAO[TON_EFET]),CTT_META_REUNIAO[DT]<=MAX(CTT_DATA[DT])))

)
MedidaCTT_OC_ABERTA.PERC_REALIZADO

DIVIDE(SUM(CTT_OC_ABERTA[QT_REAL]),
        SUM(CTT_OC_ABERTA[QT_ESTIM])
)
MedidaCTT_PERDA.Z_CTT_PERDA_PERC_TOTAL

IF(ISBLANK([Z_CTT_PERDA_TON_TOTAL]+[Z_CTT_PERDA_TON_TCH]),0,
    DIVIDE([Z_CTT_PERDA_TON_TOTAL],[Z_CTT_PERDA_TON_TOTAL] + [Z_CTT_PERDA_TON_TCH])
)
MedidaCTT_PERDA.Z_CTT_PERDA_PERC_TOTAL_ANO

VAR DTINI = [DT_SAFRA_INI]
//VAR DTINI = EOMONTH(MAX(X_DATA[DT]),-1)+1
//VAR DTINI = MAX(X_DATA[DT]) + 0 - WEEKDAY(MAX(X_DATA[DT]),3)
VAR DTFIM = MAX(X_DATA[DT])
RETURN
DIVIDE(CALCULATE([Z_CTT_PERDA_TON_TOTAL],
                FILTER(ALL(CTT_PERDA),CTT_PERDA[DT_HISTORICO] >= DTINI),
                FILTER(ALL(CTT_PERDA),CTT_PERDA[DT_HISTORICO] <= DTFIM),
                FILTERS(FRENTRANSP[DE_FREN_TRAN])
                ),
    CALCULATE([Z_CTT_PERDA_TON_TOTAL],
                FILTER(ALL(CTT_PERDA),CTT_PERDA[DT_HISTORICO] >= DTINI),
                FILTER(ALL(CTT_PERDA),CTT_PERDA[DT_HISTORICO] <= DTFIM),
                FILTERS(FRENTRANSP[DE_FREN_TRAN])
                )
    + 
    CALCULATE([Z_CTT_PERDA_TON_TCH],
            FILTER(ALL(CTT_PERDA),CTT_PERDA[DT_HISTORICO] >= DTINI),
            FILTER(ALL(CTT_PERDA),CTT_PERDA[DT_HISTORICO] <= DTFIM),
            FILTERS(FRENTRANSP[DE_FREN_TRAN])
            )
    )
MedidaCTT_PERDA.Z_CTT_PERDA_PERC_TOTAL_ANO_IDCOR

IF([Z_CTT_META_R_PERDA_ANO]>=[Z_CTT_PERDA_PERC_TOTAL_ANO],1,2)
MedidaCTT_PERDA.Z_CTT_PERDA_PERC_TOTAL_MES

//VAR DTINI = [DT_SAFRA_INI]
VAR DTINI = EOMONTH(MAX(X_DATA[DT]),-1)+1
//VAR DTINI = MAX(X_DATA[DT]) + 0 - WEEKDAY(MAX(X_DATA[DT]),3)
VAR DTFIM = MAX(X_DATA[DT])
RETURN
DIVIDE(CALCULATE([Z_CTT_PERDA_TON_TOTAL],
                FILTER(ALL(CTT_PERDA),CTT_PERDA[DT_HISTORICO] >= DTINI),
                FILTER(ALL(CTT_PERDA),CTT_PERDA[DT_HISTORICO] <= DTFIM),
                FILTERS(FRENTRANSP[DE_FREN_TRAN])
                ),
    CALCULATE([Z_CTT_PERDA_TON_TOTAL],
            FILTER(ALL(CTT_PERDA),CTT_PERDA[DT_HISTORICO] >= DTINI),
            FILTER(ALL(CTT_PERDA),CTT_PERDA[DT_HISTORICO] <= DTFIM),
            FILTERS(FRENTRANSP[DE_FREN_TRAN])
            )
    + 
    CALCULATE([Z_CTT_PERDA_TON_TCH],
            FILTER(ALL(CTT_PERDA),CTT_PERDA[DT_HISTORICO] >= DTINI),
            FILTER(ALL(CTT_PERDA),CTT_PERDA[DT_HISTORICO] <= DTFIM),
            FILTERS(FRENTRANSP[DE_FREN_TRAN])
            )
    )
MedidaCTT_PERDA.Z_CTT_PERDA_PERC_TOTAL_MES_IDCOR

IF([Z_CTT_META_R_PERDA_MES]>=[Z_CTT_PERDA_PERC_TOTAL_MES],1,2)
MedidaCTT_PERDA.Z_CTT_PERDA_PERC_TOTAL_SEMANA

//VAR DTINI = [DT_SAFRA_INI]
//VAR DTINI = EOMONTH(MAX(X_DATA[DT]),-1)+1
VAR DTINI = MAX(X_DATA[DT]) + 0 - WEEKDAY(MAX(X_DATA[DT]),3)
VAR DTFIM = MAX(X_DATA[DT])
RETURN
DIVIDE(CALCULATE([Z_CTT_PERDA_TON_TOTAL],
                FILTER(ALL(CTT_PERDA),CTT_PERDA[DT_HISTORICO] >= DTINI),
                FILTER(ALL(CTT_PERDA),CTT_PERDA[DT_HISTORICO] <= DTFIM),
                FILTERS(FRENTRANSP[DE_FREN_TRAN])
                ),
    CALCULATE([Z_CTT_PERDA_TON_TOTAL],
            FILTER(ALL(CTT_PERDA),CTT_PERDA[DT_HISTORICO] >= DTINI),
            FILTER(ALL(CTT_PERDA),CTT_PERDA[DT_HISTORICO] <= DTFIM),
            FILTERS(FRENTRANSP[DE_FREN_TRAN])
            )
    + 
    CALCULATE([Z_CTT_PERDA_TON_TCH],
            FILTER(ALL(CTT_PERDA),CTT_PERDA[DT_HISTORICO] >= DTINI),
            FILTER(ALL(CTT_PERDA),CTT_PERDA[DT_HISTORICO] <= DTFIM),
            FILTERS(FRENTRANSP[DE_FREN_TRAN])
            )
    )
MedidaCTT_PERDA.Z_CTT_PERDA_PERC_TOTAL_SEMANA_IDCOR

IF([Z_CTT_META_R_PERDA_SEMANA]>=[Z_CTT_PERDA_PERC_TOTAL_SEMANA],1,2)
MedidaCTT_PERDA.Z_CTT_PERDA_TON_CANAINTEIRA

    DIVIDE(SUM(CTT_PERDA[CANA_INTEIRA]),SUM(CTT_PERDA[PRD]))
MedidaCTT_PERDA.Z_CTT_PERDA_TON_ESTILHACO

    DIVIDE(SUM(CTT_PERDA[ESTILHAÇO]),SUM(CTT_PERDA[PRD]))
MedidaCTT_PERDA.Z_CTT_PERDA_TON_PALMITO

    DIVIDE(SUM(CTT_PERDA[PALMITO]),SUM(CTT_PERDA[PRD]))
MedidaCTT_PERDA.Z_CTT_PERDA_TON_PEDACOFIXO

    DIVIDE(SUM(CTT_PERDA[PEDACO_FIXO]),SUM(CTT_PERDA[PRD]))
MedidaCTT_PERDA.Z_CTT_PERDA_TON_PEDACOSOLTO

    DIVIDE(SUM(CTT_PERDA[PEDACO_SOLTO]),SUM(CTT_PERDA[PRD]))
MedidaCTT_PERDA.Z_CTT_PERDA_TON_RPM_ESTIL

    DIVIDE(SUM(CTT_PERDA[RPM_ESTIL]),SUM(CTT_PERDA[PRD]))
MedidaCTT_PERDA.Z_CTT_PERDA_TON_TCH

DIVIDE(
    SUM(CTT_PERDA[PRD])
    ,
    SUM(CTT_PERDA[AREA])
)
MedidaCTT_PERDA.Z_CTT_PERDA_TON_TOCO

    DIVIDE(SUM(CTT_PERDA[TOCO]),SUM(CTT_PERDA[PRD]))
MedidaCTT_PERDA.Z_CTT_PERDA_TON_TOLETE

    DIVIDE(SUM(CTT_PERDA[TOLETE]),SUM(CTT_PERDA[PRD]))
MedidaCTT_PERDA.Z_CTT_PERDA_TON_TOLETE_ESTIL

    DIVIDE(SUM(CTT_PERDA[TOLETE_ESTIL]),SUM(CTT_PERDA[PRD]))
MedidaCTT_PERDA.Z_CTT_PERDA_TON_TOTAL

    DIVIDE(SUM(CTT_PERDA[PALMITO]),SUM(CTT_PERDA[PRD]))+
    DIVIDE(SUM(CTT_PERDA[TOLETE]),SUM(CTT_PERDA[PRD]))+
    DIVIDE(SUM(CTT_PERDA[ESTILHAÇO]),SUM(CTT_PERDA[PRD]))+
    DIVIDE(SUM(CTT_PERDA[CANA_INTEIRA]),SUM(CTT_PERDA[PRD]))+
    DIVIDE(SUM(CTT_PERDA[PEDACO_SOLTO]),SUM(CTT_PERDA[PRD]))+
    DIVIDE(SUM(CTT_PERDA[PEDACO_FIXO]),SUM(CTT_PERDA[PRD]))+
    DIVIDE(SUM(CTT_PERDA[TOCO]),SUM(CTT_PERDA[PRD]))+
    DIVIDE(SUM(CTT_PERDA[TOLETE_ESTIL]),SUM(CTT_PERDA[PRD]))+
    DIVIDE(SUM(CTT_PERDA[RPM_ESTIL]),SUM(CTT_PERDA[PRD]))
MedidaCTT_TAH.Z_CTT_TAH_IDADE

DIVIDE(SUM(CTT_TAH[POND_IDADE_TON]), SUM(CTT_TAH[TON]))
MedidaCTT_TAH.Z_CTT_TAH_PRODUTIVIDADE

DIVIDE(SUM(CTT_TAH[TON]),SUM(CTT_TAH[AREA_CTT]))
MedidaCTT_TAH.Z_CTT_TAH_TAH

(
    DIVIDE(SUM(CTT_TAH[ACUCAR]), SUM(CTT_TAH[CANA_ACUCAR]))
    *
    DIVIDE(SUM(CTT_TAH[TON]),SUM(CTT_TAH[AREA_CTT]))
) /1000
MedidaCTT_TCH.Z_CTT_TCH_ESTI_0

DIVIDE(SUM(CTT_TCH[PRD_ESTIMADA]),SUM(CTT_TCH[AREA_ESTIMADA]))
MedidaCTT_TCH.Z_CTT_TCH_EST_0_ID

IF(ROUND([Z_CTT_TCH_REAL],0)>=ROUND([Z_CTT_TCH_ESTI_0],0),1,2)
MedidaCTT_TCH.Z_CTT_TCH_REAL

DIVIDE(SUM(CTT_TCH[PRD_REAL]),SUM(CTT_TCH[AREA_REESTIMADA3]))
MedidaCTT_TCH.Z_CTT_TCH_VAR_0

IFERROR(DIVIDE(([Z_CTT_TCH_REAL]-[Z_CTT_TCH_ESTI_0]),[Z_CTT_TCH_ESTI_0]),0)
MedidaENERGIA_SOLAR.Z_ENERGIA_SOLAR_QTKWH_ESTEMES

IF(ISBLANK(SUM(ENERGIA_SOLAR[QT_KWH])),0,
    CALCULATE(SUM(ENERGIA_SOLAR[QT_KWH]),
        DATESBETWEEN(ENERGIA_SOLAR[DT_MOVIMENTO],
            EOMONTH(LASTDATE(ENERGIA_SOLAR[DT_MOVIMENTO]),-1)+1,
            LASTDATE(ENERGIA_SOLAR[DT_MOVIMENTO])
        )
    )
)
MedidaINSETIC_BROCA.Z_INSETIC_BROCA_TALHOES

VAR TLH = CONCATENATEX(INSETIC_BROCA,
            VALUE(TRIM(INSETIC_BROCA[CD_UPNIVEL3])),", ",VALUE(TRIM(INSETIC_BROCA[CD_UPNIVEL3])),ASC)
RETURN
SWITCH(
    TRUE(),
    ISINSCOPE(INSETIC_BROCA[FAZENDA]),TLH
)
MedidaPLANT_DATA.Z_PLANT_DATA_DTREF
INT(NOW())-1
MedidaPLANT_DATA.Z_PLANT_DATA_PRD_META

VAR TIPO = SELECTEDVALUE(PLANT_TIPO[Tipo],"Todos")
RETURN
IF(TIPO = "Manual",     MAX(PLANT_DATA[HA_MANUAL_META]),
IF(TIPO = "Mecanizado", MAX(PLANT_DATA[HA_MECANIZADO_META]),
                        MAX(PLANT_DATA[PLANT_META_HA])
))
MedidaPLANT_DATA.Z_PLANT_DATA_PRD_PROJ

VAR TIPO = SELECTEDVALUE(PLANT_TIPO[Tipo],"Todos")
RETURN
IF(TIPO = "Manual",     MAX(PLANT_DATA[HA_MANUAL_PROJ]),
IF(TIPO = "Mecanizado", MAX(PLANT_DATA[HA_MECANIZADO_PROJ]),
                        MAX(PLANT_DATA[HA_PROJETADO])
))
MedidaPLANT_DATA.Z_PLANT_DATA_PRD_REAL

VAR TIPO = SELECTEDVALUE(PLANT_TIPO[Tipo],"Todos")
RETURN
IF(TIPO = "Manual",     MAX(PLANT_DATA[HA_MANUAL_REAL]),
IF(TIPO = "Mecanizado", MAX(PLANT_DATA[HA_MECANIZADO_REAL]),
                        MAX(PLANT_DATA[PLANT_REAL_HA])
))
MedidaPLANT_DATA.Z_PLANT_DATA_TXT_META

VAR DATA = [Z_PLANT_DATA_DTREF]
VAR TIPO = SELECTEDVALUE(PLANT_TIPO[Tipo],"Todos")
VAR PRD =   IF(TIPO = "Manual",
                CALCULATE(MAX(PLANT_DATA[HA_MANUAL_META]),PLANT_DATA[DT] <= DATA),
            IF(TIPO = "Mecanizado", 
                CALCULATE(MAX(PLANT_DATA[HA_MECANIZADO_META]),PLANT_DATA[DT] <= DATA),
                CALCULATE(MAX(PLANT_DATA[PLANT_META_HA]),PLANT_DATA[DT] <= DATA)
            ))
VAR QTPRD = IF(ISBLANK(PRD), 0, PRD)
RETURN
FORMAT([Z_PLANT_DATA_DTREF],"DD/MM/YY") & "  |  " &
FORMAT(QTPRD,"0,0.0") & " ha"
MedidaPLANT_DATA.Z_PLANT_DATA_TXT_META_ACM

VAR TIPO = SELECTEDVALUE(PLANT_TIPO[Tipo],"Todos")
VAR PRD =   IF(TIPO = "Manual",
                MAX(PLANT_DATA[HA_MANUAL_META]),
            IF(TIPO = "Mecanizado", 
                MAX(PLANT_DATA[HA_MECANIZADO_META]),
                MAX(PLANT_DATA[PLANT_META_HA])
            ))
VAR QTPRD = IF(ISBLANK(PRD), 0, PRD)
VAR DATA =
        IF(TIPO = "Manual",     LOOKUPVALUE(PLANT_DATA[DT], PLANT_DATA[HA_MANUAL_META], MAX(PLANT_DATA[HA_MANUAL_META])),
        IF(TIPO = "Mecanizado", LOOKUPVALUE(PLANT_DATA[DT], PLANT_DATA[HA_MECANIZADO_META], MAX(PLANT_DATA[HA_MECANIZADO_META])),
                                LOOKUPVALUE(PLANT_DATA[DT], PLANT_DATA[PLANT_META_HA], MAX(PLANT_DATA[PLANT_META_HA]))
        ))
RETURN
FORMAT(DATA,  "DD/MM/YY") & "  |  " &
FORMAT(QTPRD, "0,0.0") & " ha"
MedidaPLANT_DATA.Z_PLANT_DATA_TXT_PROJETADO

VAR TIPO = SELECTEDVALUE(PLANT_TIPO[Tipo],"Todos")
VAR PRD =   IF(TIPO = "Manual",
                MAX(PLANT_DATA[HA_MANUAL_PROJ]),
            IF(TIPO = "Mecanizado", 
                MAX(PLANT_DATA[HA_MECANIZADO_PROJ]),
                MAX(PLANT_DATA[PLANT_META_HA])
            ))
VAR QTPRD = IF(ISBLANK(PRD), 0, PRD)
VAR DATA =
        IF(TIPO = "Manual",     LOOKUPVALUE(PLANT_DATA[DT], PLANT_DATA[HA_MANUAL_PROJ], MAX(PLANT_DATA[HA_MANUAL_PROJ])),
        IF(TIPO = "Mecanizado", LOOKUPVALUE(PLANT_DATA[DT], PLANT_DATA[HA_MECANIZADO_PROJ], MAX(PLANT_DATA[HA_MECANIZADO_PROJ])),
                                LOOKUPVALUE(PLANT_DATA[DT], PLANT_DATA[HA_PROJETADO], MAX(PLANT_DATA[HA_PROJETADO]))
        ))
RETURN
FORMAT(DATA,  "DD/MM/YY") & "  |  " &
FORMAT(QTPRD, "0,0.0") & " ha"
MedidaPLANT_DATA.Z_PLANT_DATA_TXT_REAL

VAR DATA = [Z_PLANT_DATA_DTREF]
VAR TIPO = SELECTEDVALUE(PLANT_TIPO[Tipo],"Todos")
VAR PRD =   IF(TIPO = "Manual",
                CALCULATE(MAX(PLANT_DATA[HA_MANUAL_REAL]),PLANT_DATA[DT] <= DATA),
            IF(TIPO = "Mecanizado", 
                CALCULATE(MAX(PLANT_DATA[HA_MECANIZADO_REAL]),PLANT_DATA[DT] <= DATA),
                CALCULATE(MAX(PLANT_DATA[PLANT_REAL_HA]),PLANT_DATA[DT] <= DATA)
            ))
VAR QTPRD = IF(ISBLANK(PRD), 0, PRD)
RETURN
FORMAT(DATA,"DD/MM/YY") & "  |  " &
FORMAT(QTPRD,"0,0.0") & " ha"
MedidaPLANT_META.Z_PLANT_META_DIASEFET_ANO

VAR DTINI = DATE(2025,1,1)
//VAR DTINI = EOMONTH(MAX(X_DATA[DT]),-1)+1
//VAR DTINI = MAX(X_DATA[DT]) + 0 - WEEKDAY(MAX(X_DATA[DT]),3)
VAR DTFIM = MAX(X_DATA[DT])
RETURN
IF(ISBLANK(
            CALCULATE(SUM(PLANT_META[QT_DIA_EFET]),
                        FILTER(ALL(PLANT_META), PLANT_META[DT] >= DTINI),
                        FILTER(ALL(PLANT_META), PLANT_META[DT] <= DTFIM))
            ),0,
            CALCULATE(SUM(PLANT_META[QT_DIA_EFET]),
                        FILTER(ALL(PLANT_META), PLANT_META[DT] >= DTINI),
                        FILTER(ALL(PLANT_META), PLANT_META[DT] <= DTFIM))
)
MedidaPLANT_META.Z_PLANT_META_DIASEFET_MES

//VAR DTINI = DATE(2025,1,1)
VAR DTINI = EOMONTH(MAX(X_DATA[DT]),-1)+1
//VAR DTINI = MAX(X_DATA[DT]) + 0 - WEEKDAY(MAX(X_DATA[DT]),3)
VAR DTFIM = MAX(X_DATA[DT])
RETURN
IF(ISBLANK(
            CALCULATE(SUM(PLANT_META[QT_DIA_EFET]),
                        FILTER(ALL(PLANT_META), PLANT_META[DT] >= DTINI),
                        FILTER(ALL(PLANT_META), PLANT_META[DT] <= DTFIM))
            ),0,
            CALCULATE(SUM(PLANT_META[QT_DIA_EFET]),
                        FILTER(ALL(PLANT_META), PLANT_META[DT] >= DTINI),
                        FILTER(ALL(PLANT_META), PLANT_META[DT] <= DTFIM))
)
MedidaPLANT_META.Z_PLANT_META_DIASEFET_SEMANA

//VAR DTINI = DATE(2025,1,1)
//VAR DTINI = EOMONTH(MAX(X_DATA[DT]),-1)+1
VAR DTINI = MAX(X_DATA[DT]) + 0 - WEEKDAY(MAX(X_DATA[DT]),3)
VAR DTFIM = MAX(X_DATA[DT])
RETURN
IF(ISBLANK(
            CALCULATE(SUM(PLANT_META[QT_DIA_EFET]),
                        FILTER(ALL(PLANT_META), PLANT_META[DT] >= DTINI),
                        FILTER(ALL(PLANT_META), PLANT_META[DT] <= DTFIM))
            ),0,
            CALCULATE(SUM(PLANT_META[QT_DIA_EFET]),
                        FILTER(ALL(PLANT_META), PLANT_META[DT] >= DTINI),
                        FILTER(ALL(PLANT_META), PLANT_META[DT] <= DTFIM))
)
MedidaPLANT_META.Z_PLANT_META_HADIA_ANO

IF(ISBLANK(
            DIVIDE(
                    [Z_PLANT_META_PRD_ANO],
                    [Z_PLANT_META_DIASEFET_ANO]
                    )
            ),0,
            DIVIDE(
                    [Z_PLANT_META_PRD_ANO],
                    [Z_PLANT_META_DIASEFET_ANO]
                    )
)
MedidaPLANT_META.Z_PLANT_META_HADIA_MES

IF(ISBLANK(
            DIVIDE(
                    [Z_PLANT_META_PRD_MES],
                    [Z_PLANT_META_DIASEFET_MES]
                    )
            ),0,
            DIVIDE(
                    [Z_PLANT_META_PRD_MES],
                    [Z_PLANT_META_DIASEFET_MES]
                    )
)
MedidaPLANT_META.Z_PLANT_META_HADIA_SEMANA

IF(ISBLANK(
            DIVIDE(
                    [Z_PLANT_META_PRD_SEMANA],
                    [Z_PLANT_META_DIASEFET_SEMANA]
                    )
            ),0,
            DIVIDE(
                    [Z_PLANT_META_PRD_SEMANA],
                    [Z_PLANT_META_DIASEFET_SEMANA]
                    )
)
MedidaPLANT_META.Z_PLANT_META_PRD_ADICIONAL
1.4
MedidaPLANT_META.Z_PLANT_META_PRD_ANO

VAR DTINI = DATE(2025,1,1)
//VAR DTINI = EOMONTH(MAX(X_DATA[DT]),-1)+1
//VAR DTINI = MAX(X_DATA[DT]) + 0 - WEEKDAY(MAX(X_DATA[DT]),3)
VAR DTFIM = MAX(X_DATA[DT])
RETURN
IF(ISBLANK(
            CALCULATE(SUM(PLANT_META[HA_EFET]),
                        FILTER(ALL(PLANT_META), PLANT_META[DT] >= DTINI),
                        FILTER(ALL(PLANT_META), PLANT_META[DT] <= DTFIM))
            ),0,
            CALCULATE(SUM(PLANT_META[HA_EFET]),
                        FILTER(ALL(PLANT_META), PLANT_META[DT] >= DTINI),
                        FILTER(ALL(PLANT_META), PLANT_META[DT] <= DTFIM))
)

                        FILTER(ALL(PLANT_META), PLANT_META[TP_PLAN] = "P-Replantio"))
)
MedidaPLANT_MUDA.Z_PLANT_MUDA_IDADE

DIVIDE(SUM(PLANT_MUDA[POND_IDADE_MES]),SUM(PLANT_MUDA[QT_AREA]))
MedidaPLANT_MUDA.Z_PLANT_MUDA_IDADE_IDCOR

IF([Z_PLANT_MUDA_IDADE]<10,2,1)
MedidaPLANT_REAL.Z_PLANT_REAL_HADIA_ANO

IF(ISBLANK(
            DIVIDE(
                    [Z_PLANT_REAL_PRD_ANO],
                    [Z_PLANT_REAL_DIASEFET_ANO])
            ),0,
            DIVIDE(
                    [Z_PLANT_REAL_PRD_ANO],
                    [Z_PLANT_REAL_DIASEFET_ANO])
)
MedidaPLANT_REAL.Z_PLANT_REAL_HADIA_MES

if(ISBLANK(
            DIVIDE(
                    [Z_PLANT_REAL_PRD_MES],
                    [Z_PLANT_REAL_DIASEFET_MES])
            ),0,
            DIVIDE(
                    [Z_PLANT_REAL_PRD_MES],
                    [Z_PLANT_REAL_DIASEFET_MES])
)
MedidaPLANT_REAL.Z_PLANT_REAL_HADIA_SEMANA

IF(ISBLANK(
            DIVIDE(
                    [Z_PLANT_REAL_PRD_SEMANA],
                    [Z_PLANT_REAL_DIASEFET_SEMANA])
            ),0,
            DIVIDE(
                    [Z_PLANT_REAL_PRD_SEMANA],
                    [Z_PLANT_REAL_DIASEFET_SEMANA])
)
MedidaPLANT_REAL.Z_PLANT_REAL_HADIA_SEMANA_IDCOR

IF([Z_PLANT_REAL_HADIA_SEMANA]>=[Z_PLANT_META_HADIA_SEMANA],1,2)
MedidaPLANT_REAL.Z_PLANT_REAL_PRD_ANO

VAR DTINI = DATE(2025,1,1)
//VAR DTINI = EOMONTH(MAX(X_DATA[DT]),-1)+1
//VAR DTINI = MAX(X_DATA[DT]) + 0 - WEEKDAY(MAX(X_DATA[DT]),3)
VAR DTFIM = MAX(X_DATA[DT])
RETURN
IF(ISBLANK(
            CALCULATE(SUM(PLANT_REAL[QT_AREA]),
                        FILTER(ALL(PLANT_REAL), PLANT_REAL[DT_PLANTIO] >= DTINI),
                        FILTER(ALL(PLANT_REAL), PLANT_REAL[DT_PLANTIO] <= DTFIM)/*,
                        FILTER(ALL(PLANT_REAL), PLANT_REAL[FG_REPLANTIO] = "P")*/
                        )
            ),0,
            CALCULATE(SUM(PLANT_REAL[QT_AREA]),
                        FILTER(ALL(PLANT_REAL), PLANT_REAL[DT_PLANTIO] >= DTINI),
                        FILTER(ALL(PLANT_REAL), PLANT_REAL[DT_PLANTIO] <= DTFIM)/*,
                        FILTER(ALL(PLANT_REAL), PLANT_REAL[FG_REPLANTIO] = "P")*/
                        )
)
MedidaPLANT_REAL.Z_PLANT_REAL_PRD_ANO_DESDOBRA

VAR DTINI = DATE(2025,1,1)
//VAR DTINI = EOMONTH(MAX(X_DATA[DT]),-1)+1
//VAR DTINI = MAX(X_DATA[DT]) + 0 - WEEKDAY(MAX(X_DATA[DT]),3)
VAR DTFIM = MAX(X_DATA[DT])
RETURN
IF(ISBLANK(
            CALCULATE(SUM(PLANT_REAL[QT_AREA]),
                        FILTER(ALL(PLANT_REAL), PLANT_REAL[DT_PLANTIO] >= DTINI),
                        FILTER(ALL(PLANT_REAL), PLANT_REAL[DT_PLANTIO] <= DTFIM),
                        FILTER(ALL(PLANT_REAL), PLANT_REAL[CD_SIST_PLAN] = 8),
                        FILTER(ALL(PLANT_REAL), PLANT_REAL[FG_REPLANTIO] = "P")
                        )
            ),0,
            CALCULATE(SUM(PLANT_REAL[QT_AREA]),
                        FILTER(ALL(PLANT_REAL), PLANT_REAL[DT_PLANTIO] >= DTINI),
                        FILTER(ALL(PLANT_REAL), PLANT_REAL[DT_PLANTIO] <= DTFIM),
                        FILTER(ALL(PLANT_REAL), PLANT_REAL[CD_SIST_PLAN] = 8),
                        FILTER(ALL(PLANT_REAL), PLANT_REAL[FG_REPLANTIO] = "P")
                        )
)
MedidaPLANT_REAL.Z_PLANT_REAL_PRD_ANO_ESPARRAMA

6
MedidaPLANT_REAL.Z_PLANT_REAL_TXMULT_REAL

DIVIDE(
    SUM(PLANT_REAL[QT_AREA])
    ,
    SUM(PLANT_MUDA[QT_AREA])
)
MedidaPLANT_REAL_DIASEFET.Z_PLANT_REAL_DIASEFET_ANO

VAR DTINI = DATE(2025,1,1)
VAR DTFIM = MAX(PLANT_DATA[DT]) //+ 6 - WEEKDAY(MAX(PLANT_DATA[DT]),3)
RETURN
IF(ISBLANK(
            CALCULATE(SUM(PLANT_REAL_DIASEFET[DIA_EFE]),
                        FILTER(ALL(PLANT_REAL_DIASEFET), PLANT_REAL_DIASEFET[DT_MOVIMENTO] >= DTINI),
                        FILTER(ALL(PLANT_REAL_DIASEFET), PLANT_REAL_DIASEFET[DT_MOVIMENTO] <= DTFIM))
            ),0,
            CALCULATE(SUM(PLANT_REAL_DIASEFET[DIA_EFE]),
                        FILTER(ALL(PLANT_REAL_DIASEFET), PLANT_REAL_DIASEFET[DT_MOVIMENTO] >= DTINI),
                        FILTER(ALL(PLANT_REAL_DIASEFET), PLANT_REAL_DIASEFET[DT_MOVIMENTO] <= DTFIM))
)
